Baseline vital signs: temperature 37.1 °C, heart rate 92 beats per minute, blood pressure 138/82 mmHg, respiratory rate 18 breaths per minute, SpO₂ 96% on room air. She is alert and oriented to person, place, time, and situation. Cranial nerves are intact. Upper extremity strength is 5 out of 5 bilaterally with normal sensation. Lower extremity motor strength is 4 out of 5 bilaterally in hip flexors and quadriceps and 4 minus out of 5 in ankle dorsiflexors, with the left side slightly weaker than the right. She has difficulty lifting her legs against gravity with sustained resistance. Deep tendon reflexes at the patellar tendons are hyperreflexic (3+) bilaterally; Achilles reflexes are 3+ bilaterally. Babinski sign is equivocal on the right and extensor (positive, upgoing toe) on the left. Sensation to light touch and pinprick is diminished below approximately the T8 dermatome, with a vague band of hyperesthesia at the T6–T7 level. Proprioception in the great toes is mildly reduced bilaterally. She has point tenderness on palpation over the T6 and T8 spinous processes. Rectal tone is present but diminished on exam performed by the admitting provider. A bladder scan shows a post-void residual of 280 mL. Skin is intact, warm, and dry. She has mild bilateral lower extremity edema (1+), which she says is chronic.

Baseline labs: WBC 6,800/µL, hemoglobin 10.8 g/dL, platelets 188,000/µL, sodium 141 mEq/L, potassium 4.2 mEq/L, chloride 102 mEq/L, bicarbonate 24 mEq/L, BUN 18 mg/dL, creatinine 0.9 mg/dL, calcium (corrected) 10.1 mg/dL, albumin 3.2 g/dL, alkaline phosphatase 312 U/L (elevated, consistent with bone metastases), ALT 28 U/L, AST 32 U/L, glucose 118 mg/dL, PT/INR 1.0, aPTT 29 seconds. Urinalysis is unremarkable.
content.zh:
基线生命体征：体温37.1 °C，心率92次/分，血压138/82 mmHg，呼吸频率18次/分，室内空气下SpO₂ 96%。患者神志清醒，对人物、地点、时间和情境的定向力正常。脑神经完整。双侧上肢肌力5/5级，感觉正常。双侧下肢髋屈肌和股四头肌肌力4/5级，踝背屈肌力4-/5级，左侧比右侧稍弱。她在持续阻力下抬起双腿抗重力时有困难。双侧髌腱深反射亢进（3+）；双侧跟腱反射3+。右侧巴宾斯基征可疑，左侧呈伸性（阳性，拇趾上翘）。约T8皮节以下的轻触觉和痛觉减退，T6–T7水平有模糊的痛觉过敏带。双侧大脚趾的本体感觉轻度减退。触诊T6和T8棘突有压痛。接诊医生检查发现直肠括约肌张力存在但减弱。膀胱扫描显示残余尿量为280 mL。皮肤完整，温暖，干燥。有轻度双侧下肢水肿（1+），她表示这是慢性的。

基线实验室数据：白细胞6,800/µL，血红蛋白10.8 g/dL，血小板188,000/µL，钠141 mEq/L，钾4.2 mEq/L，氯102 mEq/L，碳酸氢盐24 mEq/L，血尿素氮（BUN）18 mg/dL，肌酐0.9 mg/dL，校正钙10.1 mg/dL，白蛋白3.2 g/dL，碱性磷酸酶312 U/L（升高，与骨转移一致），ALT 28 U/L，AST 32 U/L，血糖118 mg/dL，PT/INR 1.0，aPTT 29秒。尿液分析无异常。

title.zh: 临床病程 — 入院后3小时

content.en: The MRI results return and confirm an epidural mass at T7 with significant spinal cord compression. The tumor is arising from the known T6 and T8 vertebral body metastases and is causing greater than 50 percent canal narrowing with cord edema and signal change on T2-weighted images. There is no evidence of spinal instability or fracture-dislocation. The oncologist and neurosurgeon are notified. The provider orders an immediate increase of dexamethasone to 10 mg IV bolus now, followed by 4 mg IV every 6 hours (urgent MSCC dexamethasone protocol). The nurse reassesses the patient after the MRI and finds the following changes: pain has increased to 9 out of 10 despite receiving oxycodone 10 mg PO one hour ago. Lower extremity motor strength has declined to 3 out of 5 bilaterally in hip flexors and quadriceps and 3 minus out of 5 in ankle dorsiflexors. She can no longer lift her legs against gravity with sustained resistance and has noticeable foot drop on the left. Sensory level has risen slightly, with diminished sensation now beginning at the T7 dermatome. She reports new numbness in her perineal area. A repeat bladder scan, performed because the patient has not voided despite adequate fluid intake over 3 hours, shows 420 mL. Vital signs: temperature 37.2 °C, heart rate 98, blood pressure 142/86, respiratory rate 20, SpO₂ 95% on room air. She is increasingly anxious, tearful, and asking, "Am I going to be paralyzed?"
content.zh: MRI结果返回，证实T7处有一个硬膜外肿块，伴有明显的脊髓压迫。肿瘤起源于已知的T6和T8椎体转移灶，导致超过50%的椎管狭窄，在T2加权图像上可见脊髓水肿和信号改变。没有脊柱不稳或骨折脱位的证据。已通知肿瘤科医生和神经外科医生。医生下达医嘱，立即将地塞米松增加至10 mg静脉推注（即刻），随后每6小时静脉注射4 mg（紧急MSCC地塞米松方案）。护士在MRI检查后重新评估患者，发现以下变化：尽管一小时前口服了10 mg羟考酮，疼痛已加剧至9/10。双侧下肢髋屈肌和股四头肌肌力下降至3/5级，踝背屈肌力下降至3-/5级。她不再能在持续阻力下抬起双腿抗重力，且左侧有明显的足下垂。感觉平面略有上升，感觉减退现在从T7皮节开始。她报告会阴区新出现麻木感。由于患者在过去3小时内摄入了充足的液体但仍未排尿，再次进行了膀胱扫描，结果显示为420 mL。生命体征：体温37.2 °C，心率98次/分，血压142/86 mmHg，呼吸频率20次/分，室内空气下SpO₂ 95%。她越来越焦虑、流泪，并问道：“我会瘫痪吗？”

title.zh: 临床病程 — 入院后8小时

content.en: The dexamethasone bolus was administered and the scheduled doses are running. A radiation oncology consult has been placed, and a neurosurgical consult is evaluating the patient for possible surgical decompression versus emergent radiation. The nurse has obtained an order for and placed an indwelling urinary catheter, which drained 550 mL of clear yellow urine on insertion. Pain management has been escalated: the provider has ordered a hydromorphone PCA pump (0.2 mg demand dose, 6-minute lockout, no basal rate). The patient's pain is now 6 out of 10 on the PCA, improved from 9 out of 10. However, the neurological examination continues to worsen: lower extremity motor strength is now 2 out of 5 bilaterally — she can only move her legs with gravity eliminated. Ankle dorsiflexion is 1 out of 5 on the left and 2 out of 5 on the right. She cannot wiggle her left toes on command. Deep tendon reflexes at the patellar tendons are now 4+ with clonus (3 beats) at both ankles. Babinski sign is clearly positive (upgoing) bilaterally. Sensory level has risen to approximately T6; she reports she cannot feel the nurse's touch below her nipple line on the left and only vaguely on the right. Perineal sensation is absent. Rectal tone, when re-evaluated by the provider, is now absent. Vital signs: temperature 37.6 °C, heart rate 86 beats/min; lower than prior after improved pain control and reduced anxiety. Blood pressure 136/80 mmHg, respiratory rate 18, SpO₂ 96% on room air. Blood glucose check is 186 mg/dL (steroid-induced hyperglycemia). Repeat calcium (corrected) is 10.8 mg/dL — trending upward. The neurosurgeon recommends emergent surgical decompression (posterior laminectomy at T6–T8) given the rapid neurological decline, to be followed by postoperative radiation. Surgery is scheduled for this evening. The patient and her family are distressed; her adult daughter asks the nurse whether surgery will make her mother walk again.
content.zh: 地塞米松推注已给药，计划剂量正在执行。已安排放射肿瘤科会诊，神经外科会诊正在评估患者以决定是进行手术减压还是紧急放疗。护士已获得医嘱并留置了导尿管，插入时引流出550 mL清澈黄色尿液。疼痛管理已升级：医生下达了氢吗啡酮PCA泵医嘱（需求剂量0.2 mg，锁定时间6分钟，无基础率）。患者在使用PCA后疼痛现为6/10，较之前的9/10有所改善。然而，神经系统检查结果继续恶化：双侧下肢肌力现在为2/5级——她只能在消除重力的情况下移动双腿。左侧踝背屈肌力为1/5级，右侧为2/5级。她无法按指令扭动左脚趾。双侧髌腱深反射现在为4+，双侧踝关节均有阵挛（3次）。双侧巴宾斯基征呈明显阳性（上翘）。感觉平面已上升至约T6；她报告说无法感觉到护士触摸左侧乳头线以下，右侧感觉也很模糊。会阴感觉缺失。医生再次评估时，直肠括约肌张力现已缺失。生命体征：体温37.6 °C，心率86次/分（较前降低，在疼痛控制改善和焦虑减轻后），血压136/80 mmHg，呼吸频率18次/分，室内空气下SpO₂ 96%。血糖检查为186 mg/dL（类固醇诱导的高血糖）。复查校正钙为10.8 mg/dL——呈上升趋势。鉴于神经功能迅速下降，神经外科医生建议进行紧急手术减压（T6–T8后路椎板切除术），随后进行术后放疗。手术安排在今晚进行。患者及其家属十分悲痛；她的成年女儿问护士手术是否能让她母亲再次行走。

title.zh: 临床病程 — 术后第1天

content.en: Approximately 30 hours after admission (roughly 18 hours after posterior laminectomy): The patient is transferred back to the oncology unit from the PACU. She is awake, alert, and oriented. Surgical site dressing at the posterior thoracic spine is clean, dry, and intact with a Jackson-Pratt drain in place with 40 mL of serosanguineous output over the past 8 hours. Vital signs: temperature 37.8 °C, heart rate 78, blood pressure 124/74, respiratory rate 16, SpO₂ 97% on 2 L nasal cannula. Pain is 5 out of 10 at the surgical site, managed on IV hydromorphone. On neurological reassessment: lower extremity motor strength is now 3 out of 5 bilaterally in hip flexors and quadriceps — improved from the 2 out of 5 seen preoperatively. Ankle dorsiflexion is 2 out of 5 bilaterally (improved on the left from 1 out of 5). She can wiggle all toes weakly on command. Deep tendon reflexes remain hyperreflexic (3+) but clonus is no longer sustained — only 1 beat at the left ankle, absent on the right. Babinski sign remains positive bilaterally. Sensory level has improved: she now perceives light touch beginning at T8 and pinprick at T9. Perineal sensation remains absent. The indwelling urinary catheter remains in place, draining clear yellow urine at 60 mL per hour. Blood glucose is 210 mg/dL; a sliding-scale insulin order is in place. Repeat labs: hemoglobin 9.6 g/dL (dropped from 10.8, expected surgical loss), creatinine 0.9 mg/dL (stable), corrected calcium 10.4 mg/dL (slightly improved from 10.8, bisphosphonate and steroids helping), alkaline phosphatase 298 U/L (stable). The dexamethasone is continued at 4 mg IV every 6 hours with a planned taper over the coming weeks. Radiation oncology plans to initiate adjuvant radiation to the T6–T8 field in 10 to 14 days once the surgical wound has begun to heal. The patient's mood is cautiously hopeful. She asks the nurse, "Will I need to learn to use a wheelchair?"
content.zh: 入院后约30小时（后路椎板切除术后约18小时）：患者从PACU转回肿瘤科病房。她神志清醒，定向力正常。胸椎后部手术部位敷料清洁、干燥、完好，留置的Jackson-Pratt引流管在过去8小时内引流出40 mL血清血液性液体。生命体征：体温37.8 °C，心率78次/分，血压124/74 mmHg，呼吸频率16次/分，鼻导管2 L吸氧下SpO₂ 97%。手术部位疼痛为5/10，通过静脉注射氢吗啡酮控制。在神经系统重新评估中：双侧下肢髋屈肌和股四头肌肌力现为3/5级——较术前的2/5级有所改善。双侧踝背屈肌力为2/5级（左侧从1/5级改善）。她能按指令微弱地扭动所有脚趾。深反射仍亢进（3+），但阵挛不再持续——左侧踝关节仅有1次搏动，右侧无。双侧巴宾斯基征仍呈阳性。感觉平面已改善：她现在能感知T8开始的轻触觉和T9开始的痛觉。会阴感觉仍缺失。留置导尿管继续使用，以60 mL/小时的速度引流出清澈黄色尿液。血糖为210 mg/dL；已下达滑动胰岛素医嘱。复查实验室数据：血红蛋白9.6 g/dL（从10.8下降，符合预期的手术丢失），肌酐0.9 mg/dL（稳定），校正钙10.4 mg/dL（从10.8略有改善，双膦酸盐和类固醇起效），碱性磷酸酶298 U/L（稳定）。地塞米松以4 mg每6小时静脉注射继续使用，计划在未来几周内逐渐减量。放射肿瘤科计划在手术伤口开始愈合后的10到14天内对T6–T8区域启动辅助放疗。患者的情绪谨慎乐观。她问护士：“我需要学习使用轮椅吗？”

stem.en: Review the patient's baseline assessment findings. The nurse should recognize that the combination of escalating mid-back pain, new bilateral leg weakness, and sensory/bladder changes is most highly suggestive of which oncologic emergency?
stem.zh: 查阅患者的基线评估结果。护士应认识到，背部中段疼痛加剧、新发双侧下肢无力以及感觉/膀胱改变的综合表现，最强烈提示以下哪种肿瘤科急症？

options.en: Opioid-induced neurotoxicity
options.zh: 阿片类药物引起的神经毒性

options.en: Malignant spinal cord compression
options.zh: 恶性脊髓压迫

options.en: Paraneoplastic cerebellar degeneration
options.zh: 副肿瘤性小脑变性

options.en: Hypercalcemia of malignancy
options.zh: 恶性高钙血症

correct.en: The combination of escalating back pain at the level of known metastases, new motor weakness with upper motor neuron signs (hyperreflexia, positive Babinski), a definable sensory level, and autonomic (bladder) dysfunction is the classic presentation of malignant spinal cord compression. This is an oncologic emergency requiring urgent intervention.
correct.zh: 已知转移病灶水平的背痛加剧、伴有上运动神经元体征（反射亢进、巴宾斯基征阳性）的新发运动无力、明确的感觉平面以及自主神经（膀胱）功能障碍的综合表现，是恶性脊髓压迫的典型表现。这是一种需要紧急干预的肿瘤科急症。

byChoice.en: While the patient has bone metastases and a slightly elevated corrected calcium (10.1 mg/dL), hypercalcemia primarily presents with generalized weakness, lethargy, confusion, nausea, and polyuria—not a specific sensory level, focal upper motor neuron signs, or escalating focal back pain.
byChoice.zh: 虽然患者有骨转移且校正钙略有升高（10.1 mg/dL），但高钙血症主要表现为全身无力、嗜睡、意识模糊、恶心和多尿——而不是特定的感觉平面、局灶性上运动神经元体征或局灶性背痛加剧。

byChoice.en: Paraneoplastic cerebellar degeneration presents with ataxia, dysarthria, and nystagmus, not an ascending spinal cord syndrome with a distinct sensory level.
byChoice.zh: 副肿瘤性小脑变性表现为共济失调、构音障碍和眼球震颤，而不是具有明显感觉平面的上行性脊髓综合征。

byChoice.en: This correctly identifies the classic triad of spinal cord compression: localized pain, followed by motor and sensory deficits, leading to autonomic dysfunction.
byChoice.zh: 这正确识别了脊髓压迫的典型三联征：局部疼痛，随后出现运动和感觉障碍，进而导致自主神经功能障碍。

byChoice.en: Opioid neurotoxicity can cause sedation, myoclonus, and hyperalgesia, but it does not cause a distinct sensory level, focal upper motor neuron signs, or localized radicular back pain.
byChoice.zh: 阿片类神经毒性可引起镇静、肌阵挛和痛觉过敏，但不会引起明显的感觉平面、局灶性上运动神经元体征或局部神经根性背痛。

testTakingStrategy.en: Recognize that a distinct sensory level (e.g., T8) combined with motor weakness and bowel/bladder changes strongly points to a spinal cord lesion rather than a systemic or metabolic issue.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 要认识到，明显的感觉平面（例如T8）结合运动无力和排便/排尿改变，强烈提示脊髓病变，而不是全身性或代谢性问题。

glossary.defZh: 肿瘤压迫脊髓导致神经功能损害的肿瘤急症。
神经功能检查中痛觉或触觉减退的明确解剖分界线。

stem.en: Review the patient's Clinical Course at Stage 1. Which action is the nurse's immediate priority?
stem.zh: 查阅患者在阶段1的临床病程。哪项操作是护士的当务之急？

options.en: Provide emotional support and reassurance regarding the risk of paralysis
options.zh: 就瘫痪的风险提供情感支持和安抚

options.en: Administer the IV dexamethasone bolus as prescribed
options.zh: 按医嘱给予静脉地塞米松推注

options.en: Perform a complete head-to-toe nursing assessment
options.zh: 进行全面的从头到脚护理评估

options.en: Prepare the patient for the insertion of an indwelling urinary catheter
options.zh: 准备为患者插入留置导尿管

correct.en: Administering the urgent MSCC dexamethasone dose is the highest-priority pharmacological intervention for malignant spinal cord compression and should not be delayed. It reduces vasogenic edema surrounding the compressed cord, which can halt or slow neurological deterioration while awaiting definitive treatment.
correct.zh: 给予紧急MSCC地塞米松剂量是恶性脊髓压迫的最高优先级药理干预措施，不应延误。它能减少受压脊髓周围的血管源性水肿，从而在等待确定性治疗时阻止或减缓神经功能恶化。

byChoice.en: Emotional support is a vital nursing role, but administering the medication that actually prevents further spinal cord damage must occur first.
byChoice.zh: 情感支持是护理的重要职责，但必须首先给予切实防止脊髓进一步损伤的药物。

byChoice.en: While performing a focused baseline neurological assessment is crucial to track the trajectory, a full routine head-to-toe assessment should not delay the administration of the emergent medication.
byChoice.zh: 虽然进行重点基线神经系统评估对跟踪病情变化轨迹至关重要，但常规的全面从头到脚评估不应延误紧急药物的给药。

byChoice.en: Catheter insertion is indicated for the patient's urinary retention (420 mL post-void residual) to prevent bladder injury, but medication administration to protect the spinal cord takes priority.
byChoice.zh: 针对患者的尿潴留（残余尿量420 mL），有指征进行导尿以防止膀胱损伤，但保护脊髓的药物给药应优先进行。

byChoice.en: Dexamethasone is the first-line emergent intervention to reduce cord edema and preserve neurologic function. Time is critical.
byChoice.zh: 地塞米松是减少脊髓水肿和保护神经功能的首选紧急干预措施。时间至关重要。

testTakingStrategy.en: When key assessment data already identify an emergency and a time-sensitive medication is prescribed, do not delay treatment for a routine full assessment.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当关键评估资料已经提示急症，且已开具具有时间敏感性的药物医嘱时，不要为了常规全面评估而延误治疗。

stem.en: At Stage 1, the patient's bladder scan shows 420 mL of urine and she has new perineal numbness. The nurse should recognize that these findings indicate which of the following?
stem.zh: 在阶段1，患者的膀胱扫描显示有420 mL尿液，且新出现了会阴部麻木。护士应认识到这些发现提示以下哪种情况？

options.en: A localized urinary tract infection secondary to impaired mobility
options.zh: 继发于活动能力受损的局部尿路感染

options.en: An expected adverse effect of her recent oxycodone administration
options.zh: 她近期服用羟考酮的预期不良反应

options.en: Dehydration requiring an increase in her IV fluid rate
options.zh: 脱水，需要增加其静脉输液速度

options.en: Interruption of descending autonomic pathways indicating progressive spinal cord compression
options.zh: 下行自主神经通路中断，提示进行性脊髓压迫

correct.en: Urinary retention in the context of thoracic spinal cord compression reflects the interruption of descending autonomic pathways. It is an ominous neurological finding when accompanied by worsening lower-extremity weakness, a rising sensory level, and new perineal sensory change.
correct.zh: 在胸髓压迫的情况下，尿潴留反映了下行自主神经通路的中断。当伴有下肢无力加重、感觉平面上升和新发的会阴感觉改变时，这是一个不祥的神经系统发现。

byChoice.en: Dehydration would present with low urine volume in the bladder (oliguria), not urinary retention with a high post-void residual volume.
byChoice.zh: 脱水会表现为膀胱内尿量少（少尿），而不是伴有高残余尿量的尿潴留。

byChoice.en: A UTI would typically cause dysuria, frequency, or fever, and her baseline urinalysis was unremarkable. It would not explain the perineal numbness.
byChoice.zh: 尿路感染通常会引起排尿困难、尿频或发热，且其基线尿液分析无异常。它无法解释会阴部麻木。

byChoice.en: While opioids can cause urinary retention, attributing these findings solely to the medication misses the concurrent ascending sensory deficits and motor decline, leading to a dangerous underestimation of the neurologic emergency.
byChoice.zh: 虽然阿片类药物可引起尿潴留，但如果将这些发现仅仅归因于药物，就会忽略同时出现的上行性感觉障碍和运动能力下降，从而导致对神经系统急症危险程度的严重低估。

byChoice.en: This accurately attributes the autonomic dysfunction (urinary retention) to the worsening spinal cord compression.
byChoice.zh: 这准确地将自主神经功能障碍（尿潴留）归因于不断恶化的脊髓压迫。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a symptom (retention) occurs alongside localizing neurologic signs (sensory level, perineal numbness), trace the symptom to the central neurologic lesion rather than a side effect.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当症状（尿潴留）与定位性神经体征（感觉平面、会阴麻木）同时出现时，应将症状追溯至中枢神经系统病变，而非副作用。

stem.en: Review the Clinical Course at Stage 2. The neurosurgeon recommends emergent surgical decompression. Which of the following actions should the nurse take to safely prepare the patient for surgery? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 查阅阶段2的临床病程。神经外科医生建议进行紧急手术减压。护士应采取以下哪些措施来安全地为患者做好手术准备？请选择所有适用项。

options.en: Explain the surgical risks and prognostic outcome of the laminectomy to the family.
options.zh: 向家属解释椎板切除术的手术风险和预后结果。

options.en: Verify that the surgeon has discussed the procedure and obtained informed consent.
options.zh: 核实外科医生已讨论了手术程序并获得了知情同意。

options.en: Ensure current laboratories, a type and screen, and imaging are available.
options.zh: 确保有最新的实验室检查、血型和抗体筛查以及影像学资料。

options.en: Hold the scheduled enoxaparin dose and communicate this to the surgical team.
options.zh: 暂停预定的依诺肝素剂量，并将此情况传达给手术团队。

options.en: Continue serial neurological assessments to document the trajectory of decline.
options.zh: 继续进行连续的神经系统评估，以记录病情下降的轨迹。

options.en: Administer a stat dose of regular insulin to correct the steroid-induced hyperglycemia to a target of 100 mg/dL.
options.zh: 给予立即剂量的常规胰岛素，以将类固醇诱导的高血糖纠正至目标值100 mg/dL。

correct.en: Preparing a patient for emergent spinal decompression requires verifying informed consent, ensuring safety (holding anticoagulation), preparing necessary preoperative data (labs, imaging, type and screen), and continuing to monitor the rapid neurological decline. Holding the enoxaparin is critical to prevent epidural hematoma. The nurse's role in consent is to verify it was obtained by the provider, not to explain surgical risks or prognosticate.
correct.zh: 为患者进行紧急脊髓减压术做准备需要核实知情同意、确保安全（暂停抗凝治疗）、准备必要的术前数据（实验室检查、影像学、血型和抗体筛查），并继续监测迅速下降的神经功能。暂停依诺肝素对于预防硬膜外血肿至关重要。护士在知情同意中的作用是核实医生已获得同意，而不是解释手术风险或预测预后。

byChoice.en: Explaining surgical risks, benefits, and definitive prognostic outcomes is the responsibility of the surgeon, not within the nursing scope of practice.
byChoice.zh: 解释手术风险、益处和明确的预后结果是外科医生的责任，不在护理执业范围之内。

byChoice.en: The nurse acts as a patient advocate and witness by verifying that the surgeon has provided the information and the patient has consented.
byChoice.zh: 护士通过核实外科医生已提供信息且患者已同意，充当患者的倡导者和见证人。

byChoice.en: These are standard, essential preoperative safety checks, especially given the potential for blood loss in spinal tumor surgery.
byChoice.zh: 这些是标准且必要的术前安全检查，特别是考虑到脊柱肿瘤手术可能会有失血。

byChoice.en: Administering anticoagulation (enoxaparin) immediately before spinal surgery increases the risk of catastrophic bleeding and epidural hematoma. It must be held.
byChoice.zh: 在脊柱手术前立即给予抗凝治疗（依诺肝素）会增加灾难性出血和硬膜外血肿的风险。必须暂停。

byChoice.en: Ongoing assessment provides the surgical team with the most up-to-date trajectory, confirming the ongoing need for emergent intervention.
byChoice.zh: 持续评估为手术团队提供了最新的病情轨迹，证实了持续需要紧急干预。

byChoice.en: While the hyperglycemia (186 mg/dL) must be communicated to anesthesia and treated per protocol, tightly targeting 100 mg/dL with a stat insulin dose immediately pre-op risks severe intraoperative hypoglycemia.
byChoice.zh: 虽然高血糖（186 mg/dL）必须传达给麻醉科并按方案处理，但在术前立即给予常规胰岛素以严格达到100 mg/dL的目标会带来严重的术中低血糖风险。

testTakingStrategy.en: Differentiate between nursing responsibilities (verifying consent, holding contraindicated medications, monitoring) and provider responsibilities (obtaining informed consent, prognosticating).
testTakingStrategy.zh: 区分护理职责（核实知情同意、停用有禁忌的药物、监测）和医生职责（获取知情同意、预测预后）。

stem.en: At Stage 2, the patient's daughter asks the nurse, "Will surgery make my mother walk again?" Which is the most appropriate response by the nurse?
stem.zh: 在阶段2，患者的女儿问护士：“手术能让我母亲再次走路吗？”护士最恰当的回答是哪一项？

options.en: "I understand how frightening this is. The goal of surgery is to take pressure off the spinal cord and prevent further neurologic loss. Some patients regain function, and the fact that your mother still has some leg movement is encouraging, but the neurosurgeon is the best person to discuss expected recovery."
options.zh: “我理解这有多令人害怕。手术的目的是减轻对脊髓的压迫，防止神经功能进一步丧失。有些患者会恢复功能，你母亲的腿还有一些活动能力这是令人鼓舞的，但神经外科医生是讨论预期恢复情况的最佳人选。”

options.en: "The damage from the tumor is usually permanent. Surgery is just a palliative measure to reduce pain, so she will likely need a wheelchair."
options.zh: “肿瘤造成的损伤通常是永久性的。手术只是一种减轻疼痛的姑息性措施，所以她很可能需要轮椅。”

options.en: "Don't worry, the neurosurgeon is highly skilled. The surgery will fix the compression and she will be able to walk again after rehabilitation."
options.zh: “别担心，神经外科医生医术高超。手术将解决压迫问题，她在康复后将能再次行走。”

options.en: "I am not allowed to discuss her prognosis with you. You must wait until the surgeon comes out of the operating room."
options.zh: “我不能和你讨论她的预后。你必须等到外科医生从手术室出来。”

correct.en: This response balances honesty, empathy, and safe nursing boundaries. It correctly identifies the primary goal of surgery (preventing further loss), provides grounded hope based on clinical data (remaining motor function is a good prognostic sign), and appropriately refers definitive prognostication to the surgeon.
correct.zh: 这个回答平衡了诚实、同理心和安全的护理界限。它正确地指出了手术的主要目标（防止进一步的丧失），基于临床数据提供了有根据的希望（保留的运动功能是良好的预后标志），并适当地将明确的预后预测交给外科医生。

byChoice.en: While the nurse cannot offer a definitive prognosis, this response is abrupt, non-therapeutic, and dismissive of the family's severe emotional distress.
byChoice.zh: 虽然护士不能提供明确的预后，但这回答过于生硬、缺乏治疗性，且无视了家属严重的精神痛苦。

byChoice.en: This provides false reassurance and makes a guarantee about recovery that the nurse cannot promise, violating veracity and scope of practice.
byChoice.zh: 这提供了虚假的安慰，并对恢复做出了护士无法承诺的保证，违反了真实性原则和执业范围。

byChoice.en: This is overly pessimistic, inaccurate (surgery aims to decompress, and recovery is possible, especially since she has some residual motor function), and destroys hope.
byChoice.zh: 这过于悲观且不准确（手术旨在减压，并且有可能恢复，特别是考虑到她还有一些残余运动功能），摧毁了希望。

byChoice.en: This provides therapeutic communication, accurate general information, and refers the specific prognostic question to the provider.
byChoice.zh: 这提供了治疗性沟通、准确的一般信息，并将具体的预后问题转交给医生。

testTakingStrategy.en: Avoid responses that offer false reassurance or definitive prognostic guarantees, but also avoid shutting down communication. Choose responses that state factual goals and refer to the provider for specifics.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 避免提供虚假安慰或明确预后保证的回答，但也要避免终止沟通。选择陈述事实目标并将具体细节转交给医生的回答。

stem.en: At Stage 3 (postoperative day 1), the nurse evaluates the patient's neurological response to surgery. For each assessment finding, specify whether it indicates an improvement from the preoperative baseline or indicates persistent spinal cord dysfunction.
stem.zh: 在阶段3（术后第1天），护士评估患者对手术的神经系统反应。针对以下每项评估发现，请指明它是表明较术前基线有所改善，还是表明存在持续的脊髓功能障碍。

rows.en: Bilateral lower extremity motor strength is 3 out of 5

rows.zh: 双侧巴宾斯基征仍为阳性

correct.en: Evaluation requires serial comparison. Preoperatively, motor strength had dropped to 2/5; 3/5 is an improvement. The sensory level had risen to T6; dropping back to T8–T9 is an improvement. However, positive Babinski signs reflect persistent upper motor neuron damage, and absent perineal sensation reflects persistent autonomic/sacral dysfunction, which typically recovers last.
correct.zh: 评估需要进行连续比较。术前，肌力已降至2/5级；3/5级是一种改善。感觉平面曾上升至T6；回落至T8–T9是一种改善。然而，巴宾斯基征阳性反映了持续的上运动神经元损伤，而会阴感觉缺失反映了持续的自主神经/骶神经功能障碍，这通常是最后恢复的。

byChoice.en: Motor strength was 2/5 (unable to lift against gravity) prior to surgery and is now 3/5 (can move against gravity). This demonstrates functional improvement.
byChoice.zh: 手术前肌力为2/5级（不能抗重力抬起），现在为3/5级（能抗重力移动）。这表明功能有所改善。

byChoice.en: A positive Babinski sign is an abnormal upper motor neuron reflex indicating that corticospinal tract dysfunction persists.
byChoice.zh: 巴宾斯基征阳性是一种异常的上运动神经元反射，表明皮质脊髓束功能障碍持续存在。

byChoice.en: The sensory loss had ascended to the T6 level preoperatively. The lowering of the level back down to T8–T9 demonstrates improved sensory pathway function.
byChoice.zh: 术前感觉丧失平面已上升至T6水平。该平面回落至T8–T9表明感觉通路功能有所改善。

byChoice.en: Perineal sensation was lost as compression worsened. Its continued absence indicates that sacral-mediated perineal/autonomic function has not yet recovered.
byChoice.zh: 随着压迫加重，会阴感觉丧失。其持续缺失表明由骶段介导的会阴/自主神经功能尚未恢复。

testTakingStrategy.en: Compare the current assessment data directly against the data from the worst point in the clinical course (Stage 2) to determine if a finding represents an improvement or persistent pathology.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 将当前的评估数据与临床病程中最差的时间点（阶段2）的数据直接进行比较，以确定某项发现代表的是改善还是持续的病理状态。

stem.en: Complete the unfolding case study about a patient developing cytokine release syndrome and probable ICANS after CAR-T cell infusion.
stem.zh: 完成关于一名患者在 CAR-T 细胞输注后出现细胞因子释放综合征和疑似 ICANS 的展开式病例。

correct.en: This unfolding case requires recognizing CRS, treating neutropenic fever risk concurrently, distinguishing probable ICANS, prioritizing oxygenation and perfusion, and evaluating response after tocilizumab and corticosteroids.
correct.zh: 本展开式病例要求识别 CRS，同时处理中性粒细胞减少性发热风险，区分疑似 ICANS，优先处理氧合和灌注，并评估使用托珠单抗和皮质类固醇后的反应。

testTakingStrategy.en: Trend the case across stages instead of anchoring on a single abnormal value.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 按阶段观察病例趋势，不要只锚定某一个异常数值。

glossary.defZh: 免疫治疗后可能出现的全身性炎症反应，可表现为发热、低血压和缺氧。

glossary.termZh: 免疫效应细胞相关神经毒性综合征
glossary.defZh: 免疫效应细胞治疗后可能出现的神经系统毒性，可通过 ICE 评分等工具监测。

title.en: Cytokine release syndrome following CAR-T cell infusion
title.zh: CAR-T 细胞输注后的细胞因子释放综合征

summary.en: A patient develops fever, hypotension, hypoxia, and neurocognitive changes after CAR-T therapy.
summary.zh: 一名患者在 CAR-T 治疗后出现发热、低血压、缺氧和神经认知变化。

content.en:
A 58-year-old man with relapsed diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) is admitted to the bone marrow transplant and cellular therapy unit for axicabtagene ciloleucel (axi-cel) CAR-T cell infusion. He previously received two lines of chemoimmunotherapy with initial response followed by progressive disease. His past medical history includes well-controlled hypertension managed with lisinopril 10 mg daily and type 2 diabetes managed with metformin 1000 mg twice daily; metformin was held 48 hours before admission per protocol. He has no history of cardiac disease, pulmonary disease, or neurological conditions. Lymphodepleting chemotherapy with fludarabine and cyclophosphamide was completed three days ago, and the CAR-T cell product was infused this morning at 0800 without immediate infusion reaction.

Standing orders include continuous telemetry, strict intake and output (patient is using a urinal, and urine output is measured every 4 hours), neurological assessments every 4 hours using the ICE (Immune Effector Cell-Associated Encephalopathy) scoring tool, vital signs every 4 hours for the first 24 hours then escalating to every 2 hours or more frequently if any signs of cytokine release syndrome (CRS) emerge. Tocilizumab 8 mg/kg IV is available at bedside for CRS management per institutional protocol, and dexamethasone is readily accessible. IV normal saline is infusing at 75 mL/hr for maintenance hydration. The patient has a double-lumen peripherally inserted central catheter (PICC).
content.zh:
一名 58 岁复发性弥漫性大 B 细胞淋巴瘤 (DLBCL) 男性患者入住骨髓移植和细胞治疗病房，接受阿基仑赛 (axi-cel) CAR-T 细胞输注。他之前接受过二线化学免疫治疗，初始有缓解，随后疾病进展。既往史包括控制良好的高血压（每日口服赖诺普利 10 mg）和 2 型糖尿病（每日两次口服二甲双胍 1000 mg）；按方案在入院前 48 小时停用二甲双胍。无心脏病、肺部疾病或神经系统疾病史。三天前完成了氟达拉滨和环磷酰胺的淋巴细胞清除化疗，今天上午 0800 输注了 CAR-T 细胞产品，无立即输注反应。

常规医嘱包括持续心电监护、严格记录出入量（患者使用尿壶，每 4 小时测量一次尿量），每 4 小时使用 ICE 评分工具进行神经系统评估，前 24 小时每 4 小时测量一次生命体征，如果出现任何细胞因子释放综合征 (CRS) 迹象，则增加至每 2 小时一次或更频繁。床旁备有静脉注射托珠单抗 8 mg/kg 以备按机构方案管理 CRS，地塞米松也随时可用。静脉输注 0.9% 氯化钠注射液 75 mL/hr 以维持水合。患者留置有双腔经外周静脉穿刺中心静脉导管 (PICC)。

title.zh: 基线评估，输注后四小时

content.en:
At 1200, four hours after infusion, the patient is resting comfortably in bed. He reports mild fatigue, which he attributes to the lymphodepleting chemotherapy. He is alert, oriented to person, place, time, and situation, conversational, and in no acute distress. He denies headache, chills, nausea, dyspnea, or muscle aches. His wife is at the bedside and confirms he seems like himself.

Baseline vital signs at 1200: Temperature 36.8 °C (oral), heart rate 78 and regular sinus rhythm on telemetry, blood pressure 132/78, respiratory rate 14, SpO₂ 98% on room air. Lungs clear to auscultation bilaterally, no adventitious sounds. Heart sounds regular, no murmur or gallop. Abdomen soft, non-tender, with normoactive bowel sounds. Skin warm and dry, no rash. Capillary refill less than 2 seconds. ICE score 10 out of 10 (fully intact). Urine output 280 mL over the past 4 hours, clear yellow. No peripheral edema. PICC site clean, dry, and intact with brisk blood return from both lumens.
content.zh:
在 1200（输注后四小时），患者在床上舒适地休息。他报告有轻度疲劳，他将其归因于淋巴细胞清除化疗。他神志清醒，对人物、地点、时间和情境的定向力正常，能正常交谈，无急性不适。否认头痛、发冷、恶心、呼吸困难或肌肉酸痛。他的妻子在床旁，确认他看起来状态如常。

1200 的基线生命体征：体温 36.8 °C（口温），心率 78 次/分，心电监护示窦性心律齐，血压 132/78 mmHg，呼吸频率 14 次/分，室内空气下 SpO₂ 98%。双肺听诊清晰，无附加音。心音规律，无杂音或奔马律。腹部柔软，无压痛，肠鸣音正常。皮肤温暖干燥，无皮疹。毛细血管充盈时间小于 2 秒。ICE 评分为 10/10（完全正常）。过去 4 小时尿量为 280 mL，呈清澈黄色。无外周水肿。PICC 穿刺部位清洁、干燥、完好，双侧管腔回血均通畅。

content.en:
Baseline labs drawn at 1000, two hours post-infusion:
WBC 0.3 × 10³/µL
ANC 0.1 × 10³/µL
Hemoglobin 9.8 g/dL
Platelets 45,000/µL
BUN 14 mg/dL
Creatinine 0.9 mg/dL
Sodium 138 mEq/L
Potassium 4.2 mEq/L
Chloride 102 mEq/L
Bicarbonate 24 mEq/L
Glucose 148 mg/dL
AST 28 U/L
ALT 32 U/L
Total bilirubin 0.8 mg/dL
LDH 220 U/L
CRP < 5 mg/L
Ferritin 320 ng/mL
Fibrinogen 310 mg/dL
INR 1.0
D-dimer 0.4 µg/mL FEU
content.zh:
1000（输注后两小时）抽取的基线实验室检查结果：
白细胞计数 (WBC) 0.3 × 10³/µL
绝对中性粒细胞计数 (ANC) 0.1 × 10³/µL
血红蛋白 9.8 g/dL
血小板 45,000/µL
血尿素氮 (BUN) 14 mg/dL
肌酐 0.9 mg/dL
钠 138 mEq/L
钾 4.2 mEq/L
氯化物 102 mEq/L
碳酸氢盐 24 mEq/L
葡萄糖 148 mg/dL
谷草转氨酶 (AST) 28 U/L
谷丙转氨酶 (ALT) 32 U/L
总胆红素 0.8 mg/dL
乳酸脱氢酶 (LDH) 220 U/L
C 反应蛋白 (CRP) < 5 mg/L
铁蛋白 320 ng/mL
纤维蛋白原 310 mg/dL
国际标准化比值 (INR) 1.0
D-二聚体 0.4 µg/mL FEU

content.en:
The nurse arrives for evening assessment and finds the patient lying in bed with a blanket pulled up, shivering intermittently. He reports feeling "achy all over, like a bad flu" with onset over the past 2 to 3 hours. He says he felt fine at the 1600 assessment except for mild fatigue. His wife reports he has been less talkative in the past hour.

Vital signs: temperature 38.9 °C (oral), heart rate 104 and sinus tachycardia on telemetry, blood pressure 118/72, respiratory rate 20, SpO₂ 96% on room air. Skin is warm and flushed with mild diaphoresis. No rash. Lungs remain clear. ICE score is 10 out of 10; he is oriented and follows commands appropriately, though he is slower to respond. Urine output over the past 4 hours is 160 mL, decreased from baseline.

The provider is notified and orders stat labs: CRP 86 mg/L, ferritin 1,450 ng/mL, fibrinogen 280 mg/dL, LDH 380 U/L, creatinine 1.0 mg/dL, AST 40 U/L, ALT 38 U/L. Vital sign frequency is increased to every 2 hours. The provider documents suspected CRS Grade 1 and orders acetaminophen 650 mg PO for symptom management while maintaining close monitoring. The nurse is instructed to call immediately if the patient develops hypotension, requires supplemental oxygen, or shows any neurological change.
content.zh:
护士进行晚间评估时，发现患者躺在床上，拉起毯子，阵发性发抖。他报告说在过去的 2 到 3 小时内开始感到“全身酸痛，像得了重感冒”。他说除了轻度疲劳外，在 1600 评估时感觉良好。他的妻子报告说，在过去的一个小时里，他说话变少了。

生命体征：体温 38.9 °C（口温），心率 104 次/分，心电监护示窦性心动过速，血压 118/72 mmHg，呼吸频率 20 次/分，室内空气下 SpO₂ 96%。皮肤温暖发红，伴有轻度出汗。无皮疹。双肺保持清晰。ICE 评分为 10/10；他定向力正常并能适当地遵从指令，虽然反应变慢。过去 4 小时的尿量为 160 mL，较基线减少。

已通知医疗服务提供者并下达急查实验室检查医嘱：CRP 86 mg/L，铁蛋白 1,450 ng/mL，纤维蛋白原 280 mg/dL，LDH 380 U/L，肌酐 1.0 mg/dL，AST 40 U/L，ALT 38 U/L。生命体征监测频率增加到每 2 小时一次。医疗服务提供者记录为疑似 CRS 1 级，并下达口服对乙酰氨基酚 650 mg 医嘱以控制症状，同时保持密切监测。指示护士如果患者出现低血压、需要补充氧气或表现出任何神经系统变化，需立即致电。

content.en:
Over the night shift, the patient's fever has escalated to 39.8 °C despite scheduled acetaminophen. He is now rigoring. He tells the nurse he feels dizzy when he sits up and reports a mild headache. On assessment, heart rate is 122, sinus tachycardia, blood pressure 88/52 (mean arterial pressure 64), respiratory rate 26, SpO₂ 93% on room air. Lungs have faint bibasilar crackles.

He is oriented to city and hospital but is uncertain of the year and month. He can follow a simple command and write a sentence, but he names only one of three objects and has difficulty sustaining attention. ICE score is 6/10. His wife states, "He doesn't seem right — he keeps losing his train of thought." Urine output over the past 4 hours is 80 mL.

Repeat labs: CRP 245 mg/L, ferritin 8,200 ng/mL, fibrinogen 180 mg/dL, LDH 620 U/L, creatinine 1.6 mg/dL, AST 78 U/L, ALT 65 U/L, total bilirubin 1.4 mg/dL, D-dimer 2.8 µg/mL FEU, potassium 5.1 mEq/L.

The provider documents CRS Grade 2 with concurrent probable ICANS and orders dexamethasone 10 mg IV every 6 hours. Orders also include tocilizumab 8 mg/kg IV over 60 minutes (first dose), a 500 mL normal saline IV fluid bolus, initiation of supplemental oxygen via nasal cannula at 2 L/min targeting SpO₂ greater than or equal to 94%, and preparation for possible ICU transfer.
content.zh:
在夜班期间，尽管定时服用了对乙酰氨基酚，患者的体温仍升至 39.8 °C。他现在有寒战。他告诉护士坐起来时感到头晕，并报告有轻微头痛。经评估，心率为 122 次/分，窦性心动过速，血压 88/52 mmHg（平均动脉压 64），呼吸频率 26 次/分，室内空气下 SpO₂ 93%。双肺底部有微弱湿啰音。

他对城市和医院有定向力，但对年份和月份不确定。他能遵循简单的指令并写出一个句子，但只能说出三个物品中的一个，并且难以集中注意力。ICE 评分为 6/10。他的妻子说：“他看起来不太对劲——他总是失去思路。”过去 4 小时的尿量为 80 mL。

复查实验室检查：CRP 245 mg/L，铁蛋白 8,200 ng/mL，纤维蛋白原 180 mg/dL，LDH 620 U/L，肌酐 1.6 mg/dL，AST 78 U/L，ALT 65 U/L，总胆红素 1.4 mg/dL，D-二聚体 2.8 µg/mL FEU，钾 5.1 mEq/L。

医疗服务提供者记录为 CRS 2 级伴并发疑似 ICANS，并下达每 6 小时静脉注射地塞米松 10 mg 医嘱。医嘱还包括静脉滴注托珠单抗 8 mg/kg（第一剂），持续 60 分钟；快速静脉输注 500 mL 0.9% 氯化钠注射液；通过鼻导管以 2 L/min 开始补充氧气，目标 SpO₂ 大于或等于 94%；并为可能转入 ICU 做好准备。

content.en:
12 hours after tocilizumab and initiation of dexamethasone. The patient received the tocilizumab infusion without incident and has received three doses of dexamethasone.

On reassessment: temperature 37.6 °C (down from 39.8), heart rate 96 (sinus rhythm, improved from 122), blood pressure 108/68 (up from 88/52 and now stable without vasopressors after one additional 250 mL bolus), respiratory rate 18, SpO₂ 96% on 1 L nasal cannula (weaned from 2 L).

The patient is alert and oriented to year, month, city, and hospital. ICE score has improved from 6/10 to 9/10 (one point off for naming; he was unable to name one of the three objects but could write a full sentence, sustain attention, and follow commands). His wife says, "He seems much more like himself." Lungs are clear; crackles have resolved. Urine output over the past 4 hours is 220 mL (improving).

Repeat labs: CRP 110 mg/L (still elevated but trending down from 245), ferritin 5,400 ng/mL (down from 8,200), fibrinogen 240 mg/dL (improving from 180), LDH 420 U/L, creatinine 1.2 mg/dL (improving from 1.6), AST 52 U/L, ALT 48 U/L, D-dimer 1.6 µg/mL FEU, potassium 4.4 mEq/L.

The provider continues dexamethasone on a taper schedule, maintains tocilizumab availability for a second dose if the patient re-spikes fever or becomes hypotensive again, and asks the nurse to continue frequent vital signs and neurological assessments every 4 hours. ICU transfer is deferred for now, pending sustained stability.
content.zh:
托珠单抗和开始使用地塞米松后 12 小时。患者顺利接受了托珠单抗输注，并已接受三剂地塞米松。

重新评估时：体温 37.6 °C（从 39.8 下降），心率 96 次/分（窦性心律，较 122 改善），血压 108/68 mmHg（从 88/52 上升，在额外推注 250 mL 补液后，目前在不使用血管加压药的情况下保持稳定），呼吸频率 18 次/分，鼻导管吸氧 1 L 下 SpO₂ 96%（从 2 L 逐渐减少）。

患者神志清醒，对年份、月份、城市和医院的定向力正常。ICE 评分从 6/10 提高到 9/10（命名扣一分；他无法说出三个物品中的一个，但能写出完整的句子、保持注意力并遵从指令）。他的妻子说：“他看起来恢复正常了。”双肺清晰；湿啰音已消失。过去 4 小时的尿量为 220 mL（正在改善）。

复查实验室检查：CRP 110 mg/L（仍升高，但从 245 呈下降趋势），铁蛋白 5,400 ng/mL（从 8,200 下降），纤维蛋白原 240 mg/dL（较 180 改善），LDH 420 U/L，肌酐 1.2 mg/dL（较 1.6 改善），AST 52 U/L，ALT 48 U/L，D-二聚体 1.6 µg/mL FEU，钾 4.4 mEq/L。

医疗服务提供者继续按减量计划使用地塞米松，保留托珠单抗备用第二剂，以防患者再次发热或出现低血压，并要求护士继续频繁测量生命体征和每 4 小时进行一次神经系统评估。暂时延缓转入 ICU，等待持续稳定。

stem.en: The nurse reviews the clinical cues from Stage 1. For each cue, indicate whether it supports early Cytokine Release Syndrome (CRS), neutropenic fever/sepsis risk, or is a nonspecific finding. Each row may have more than one correct category.
stem.zh: 护士复查阶段 1 的临床线索。对于每一个线索，指出它是支持早期细胞因子释放综合征 (CRS)、中性粒细胞减少性发热/败血症风险，还是非特异性发现。每一行可以有多个正确的类别。

testTakingStrategy.en: Evaluate each cue independently against both CRS and neutropenic fever pathophysiology. Avoid assuming symptoms can only belong to one category.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 针对 CRS 和中性粒细胞减少性发热的病理生理学独立评估每个线索。避免假设症状只能属于一个类别。

glossary.defZh: 由免疫疗法引发的强烈全身性炎症反应。

glossary.termZh: 中性粒细胞减少性发热
glossary.defZh: 中性粒细胞极度低下患者出现的发热，是一种医疗急症。

rows.zh: CRP 86 mg/L 且铁蛋白 1,450 ng/mL

columns.zh: 支持早期细胞因子释放综合征 (CRS)
支持中性粒细胞减少性发热/败血症风险
非特异性或预期的发现

correct.en: Recognizing the clinical signs of both CRS and neutropenic fever is critical in the post-CAR-T setting. Fever, rigors, and myalgias are hallmark initial signs of CRS but are also classic symptoms of sepsis in a neutropenic patient. An ANC of 0.1 × 10³/µL places the patient at profound risk for neutropenic fever and sepsis, requiring immediate intervention. The elevation of CRP and ferritin strongly supports the onset of CRS. Mild fatigue is a nonspecific finding often expected following lymphodepleting chemotherapy.
correct.zh: 在 CAR-T 治疗后的环境中，识别 CRS 和中性粒细胞减少性发热的临床症状至关重要。发热、寒战和肌肉酸痛是 CRS 标志性的初始体征，但也是中性粒细胞减少患者败血症的典型症状。0.1 × 10³/µL 的 ANC 使患者面临极高的中性粒细胞减少性发热和败血症风险，需要立即干预。CRP 和铁蛋白的升高强烈支持 CRS 的发作。轻度疲劳是一种非特异性发现，通常在淋巴细胞清除化疗后是可以预料的。

byChoice.en: Fever and constitutional symptoms are hallmark signs of both CRS and systemic infection, requiring workup for both.
byChoice.zh: 发热和全身症状是 CRS 和全身感染的标志性体征，需要对两者进行全面检查。

byChoice.en: Profound neutropenia places the patient at high risk for neutropenic fever and sepsis.
byChoice.zh: 严重的中性粒细胞减少使患者面临极高的中性粒细胞减少性发热和败血症风险。

byChoice.en: A rapid rise in inflammatory markers like CRP and ferritin is strongly characteristic of the onset of CRS.
byChoice.zh: CRP 和铁蛋白等炎症标志物的快速升高是 CRS 发作的强烈特征。

byChoice.en: Mild fatigue is a nonspecific finding often expected following lymphodepleting chemotherapy.
byChoice.zh: 轻度疲劳是一种非特异性发现，通常在淋巴细胞清除化疗后是可以预料的。

stem.en: Based on the Stage 1 findings, which of the following actions should the nurse anticipate or implement? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 基于阶段 1 的发现，护士应预期或执行以下哪些行动？请选择所有适用项。

testTakingStrategy.en: Identify all interventions that promote safety in both the CRS pathway and the neutropenic fever pathway. Avoid actions that delay immediate lifesaving treatments.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 识别所有能促进 CRS 路径和中性粒细胞减少性发热路径安全的干预措施。避免采取延误立即挽救生命治疗的行动。

glossary.defZh: 由免疫疗法引发的强烈全身性炎症反应。

glossary.termZh: 中性粒细胞减少性发热
glossary.defZh: 中性粒细胞极度低下患者出现的发热，是一种医疗急症。
用于评估免疫效应细胞相关神经毒性综合征严重程度的评分工具。

options.en: Assume the fever is solely expected CRS and defer infection workup.
options.zh: 假设发热仅仅是预期的 CRS 并推迟感染检查。

options.en: Anticipate initiating empiric broad-spectrum antibiotics per neutropenic fever protocol.
options.zh: 预期按中性粒细胞减少性发热方案开始使用经验性广谱抗生素。

options.en: Notify the provider and activate the institutional CRS pathway.
options.zh: 通知医疗服务提供者并启动机构的 CRS 临床路径。

options.en: Administer acetaminophen as ordered for symptom management.
options.zh: 按医嘱给予对乙酰氨基酚以控制症状。

options.en: Obtain blood cultures per protocol, including central-line lumens.
options.zh: 按方案抽取血培养，包括中心静脉导管腔。

options.en: Increase the frequency of vital signs monitoring and continue ICE scoring.
options.zh: 增加生命体征监测的频率并继续 ICE 评分。

correct.en: In a profoundly neutropenic patient post-CAR-T infusion, a new fever must be treated concurrently as potential Cytokine Release Syndrome (CRS) and a neutropenic fever/sepsis medical emergency. The nurse should notify the provider to activate the CRS pathway, obtain blood cultures per protocol, anticipate initiating broad-spectrum antibiotics, administer acetaminophen for symptom management, and increase the frequency of monitoring and ICE scoring. Waiting for culture results before giving antibiotics or assuming the fever is only CRS can cause fatal delays in treating sepsis.
correct.zh: 在 CAR-T 输注后严重中性粒细胞减少的患者中，出现新发热必须同时作为潜在的细胞因子释放综合征 (CRS) 和中性粒细胞减少性发热/败血症医疗急症来处理。护士应通知医疗服务提供者启动 CRS 临床路径，按方案抽取血培养，预期开始使用广谱抗生素，给予对乙酰氨基酚以控制症状，并增加监测和 ICE 评分的频率。在给予抗生素前等待培养结果，或仅仅假设发热是 CRS，可能会导致延误治疗败血症的致命后果。

byChoice.en: Empiric antibiotics are life-saving and must be initiated promptly in neutropenic fever, even if CRS is also suspected.
byChoice.zh: 在中性粒细胞减少性发热中，经验性抗生素能挽救生命，必须及时开始使用，即使也怀疑有 CRS。

byChoice.en: The new onset of fever with constitutional symptoms and rising biomarkers strongly suggests early CRS, requiring provider notification and pathway activation.
byChoice.zh: 新发的发热伴全身症状和升高的生物标志物强烈提示早期 CRS，需要通知医疗服务提供者并启动临床路径。

byChoice.en: CRS and ICANS can progress rapidly; escalating the frequency of monitoring is essential for early detection of deterioration.
byChoice.zh: CRS 和 ICANS 进展迅速；增加监测频率对于及早发现病情恶化至关重要。

byChoice.en: In a neutropenic patient with a new fever, obtaining blood cultures is a mandatory first step in the neutropenic sepsis protocol.
byChoice.zh: 在患有新发热的中性粒细胞减少患者中，抽取血培养是中性粒细胞减少性败血症方案中强制性的第一步。

byChoice.en: CRS and infection are not mutually exclusive. A neutropenic fever workup must occur concurrently with CRS management.
byChoice.zh: CRS 和感染并不相互排斥。必须在管理 CRS 的同时进行中性粒细胞减少性发热检查。

byChoice.en: Acetaminophen is appropriate for managing the discomfort and fever of Grade 1 CRS after an infection workup has been initiated.
byChoice.zh: 在启动感染检查后，对乙酰氨基酚适用于控制 1 级 CRS 的不适和发热。

stem.en: At Stage 2, the patient is experiencing hypoxia, hypotension, and a declining ICE score. The provider has written several new orders. In what order should the nurse implement the following actions? Drag and drop to arrange the sequence.
stem.zh: 在阶段 2，患者出现缺氧、低血压和 ICE 评分下降。医疗服务提供者下达了几项新医嘱。护士应按什么顺序执行以下行动？拖放以排列顺序。

testTakingStrategy.en: Apply the ABCs (Airway, Breathing, Circulation) priority framework to physiological instability before moving to pharmacological treatments and logistical tasks.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 在进行药物治疗和后勤任务之前，将 ABC（气道、呼吸、循环）优先框架应用于生理不稳定状态。

glossary.defZh: 一种针对 IL-6 受体的单克隆抗体，用于治疗 CRS。
一种皮质类固醇，用于治疗免疫效应细胞相关神经毒性综合征。

glossary.termZh: 免疫效应细胞相关神经毒性综合征
glossary.defZh: 免疫疗法后发生的中枢神经系统并发症。

options.en: Administer dexamethasone IV as ordered for concurrent probable ICANS.
options.zh: 按并发疑似 ICANS 医嘱静脉给予地塞米松。

options.en: Begin the ordered normal saline IV fluid bolus.
options.zh: 开始静脉推注医嘱的 0.9% 氯化钠注射液。

options.en: Prepare for possible ICU transfer while continuing frequent monitoring.
options.zh: 在继续频繁监测的同时，为可能转入 ICU 做好准备。

options.en: Apply low-flow oxygen via nasal cannula and raise the head of the bed.
options.zh: 通过鼻导管给予低流量吸氧并抬高床头。

options.en: Administer tocilizumab IV as ordered for CRS Grade 2.
options.zh: 按 CRS 2 级医嘱静脉给予托珠单抗。

correct.en: Using the ABCs (Airway, Breathing, Circulation) framework, the nurse must first stabilize oxygenation by applying low-flow oxygen and raising the head of the bed. Second, initiate the IV fluid bolus to address hypotension and support perfusion. Once basic physiological stability is addressed, pharmacological interventions follow: administer tocilizumab (the definitive treatment for CRS) and then dexamethasone (for concurrent ICANS). Finally, prepare for potential ICU transfer while continuing frequent monitoring. Transfer preparation and team communication may occur in parallel, but they must not delay life-saving oxygen, fluids, or ordered medications.
correct.zh: 使用 ABC（气道、呼吸、循环）框架，护士必须首先通过给予低流量吸氧和抬高床头来稳定氧合。其次，开始静脉推注补液以解决低血压并支持灌注。一旦基本的生理稳定性得到解决，接下来是药物干预：给予托珠单抗（CRS 的决定性治疗），然后给予地塞米松（用于并发的 ICANS）。最后，在继续频繁监测的同时为可能转入 ICU 做好准备。转运准备和团队沟通可以并行进行，但绝不能延误挽救生命的吸氧、补液或医嘱药物治疗。

byChoice.en: Transfer preparation is important, but it must not delay immediate lifesaving stabilization and ordered medication administration.
byChoice.zh: 转运准备很重要，但不得延误立即的救命稳定措施和医嘱药物治疗。

byChoice.en: Once ABCs are stabilized, administer tocilizumab as the targeted first-line pharmacological treatment for CRS.
byChoice.zh: 一旦 ABC 稳定，给予托珠单抗作为 CRS 的靶向一线药物治疗。

byChoice.en: Following CRS-directed therapy, administer corticosteroids to address the concurrent neurotoxicity (ICANS).
byChoice.zh: 在进行针对 CRS 的治疗后，给予皮质类固醇以解决并发的神经毒性 (ICANS)。

byChoice.en: Securing the airway and supporting oxygenation is the first priority in the ABCs framework.
byChoice.zh: 确保气道通畅和支持氧合是 ABC 框架中的首要任务。

byChoice.en: Addressing hypotension and restoring circulating volume is the second priority (Circulation) to maintain perfusion.
byChoice.zh: 解决低血压并恢复循环血量是第二优先事项（循环），以维持灌注。

stem.en: Review the clinical findings from Stage 2. For each finding, select the corresponding complication(s) it primarily indicates. Each row may have more than one correct category.
stem.zh: 复查阶段 2 的临床发现。对于每个发现，选择它主要表明的相应并发症。每一行可以有多个正确的类别。

testTakingStrategy.en: Associate fever, hypotension, and hypoxia with CRS grading. Associate cognitive and ICE score changes with ICANS. Recognize that severe CRS drives end-organ failure (like renal or coagulopathy).
testTakingStrategy.zh: 将发热、低血压和缺氧与 CRS 分级联系起来。将认知和 ICE 评分变化与 ICANS 联系起来。认识到严重的 CRS 会导致终末器官衰竭（如肾脏或凝血功能病变）。

glossary.termZh: 免疫效应细胞相关神经毒性综合征
glossary.defZh: 免疫疗法后发生的中枢神经系统并发症。
用于评估免疫效应细胞相关神经毒性综合征严重程度的评分工具。

rows.zh: 低血压（血压 88/52）和需要低流量吸氧

rows.en: ICE score 6/10, disorientation, and attention difficulty
rows.zh: ICE 评分 6/10、定向障碍和注意力困难

rows.en: Creatinine rising from 1.0 to 1.6 mg/dL with oliguria
rows.zh: 肌酐从 1.0 升至 1.6 mg/dL 伴少尿
纤维蛋白原下降伴 D-二聚体升高
持续发热至 39.8 °C 和寒战

columns.zh: 表明 CRS 进展或严重程度

columns.en: Indicates Immune Effector Cell-Associated Neurotoxicity Syndrome (ICANS)
columns.zh: 表明免疫效应细胞相关神经毒性综合征 (ICANS)

columns.en: Indicates early end-organ or coagulation dysfunction
columns.zh: 表明早期终末器官或凝血功能障碍

correct.en: CRS severity grading is primarily driven by fever, hypotension, and hypoxia. Therefore, hypotension requiring fluids and hypoxia requiring low-flow oxygen, along with persistent fever, indicate CRS severity. ICANS is distinct and indicated by neurological changes such as a dropping ICE score, disorientation, and attention difficulty. Rising creatinine with oliguria and falling fibrinogen with rising D-dimer suggest early end-organ and coagulation dysfunction, which are consequences of severe systemic CRS inflammation.
correct.zh: CRS 严重程度分级主要取决于发热、低血压和缺氧。因此，需要补液的低血压和需要低流量吸氧的缺氧，连同持续发热，表明了 CRS 的严重程度。ICANS 是独立的，表现为神经系统变化，如 ICE 评分下降、定向障碍和注意力集中困难。肌酐升高伴少尿，以及纤维蛋白原下降伴 D-二聚体升高，提示早期终末器官和凝血功能障碍，这些是严重的全身性 CRS 炎症的后果。

byChoice.en: Hypotension and hypoxia define the grading and severity of CRS.
byChoice.zh: 低血压和缺氧决定了 CRS 的分级和严重程度。

byChoice.en: A dropping ICE score and cognitive impairment are the defining features of ICANS.
byChoice.zh: ICE 评分下降和认知障碍是 ICANS 的决定性特征。

byChoice.en: Renal impairment is a form of end-organ dysfunction resulting from severe systemic CRS inflammation and hypotension.
byChoice.zh: 肾功能受损是由严重的全身性 CRS 炎症和低血压导致的一种终末器官功能障碍。

byChoice.en: Consumptive coagulopathy is a severe complication of systemic CRS inflammation.
byChoice.zh: 消耗性凝血病是全身性 CRS 炎症的严重并发症。

byChoice.en: Fever is the hallmark symptom indicating the presence and persistence of CRS.
byChoice.zh: 发热是指示 CRS 存在和持续的标志性症状。

stem.en: The nurse evaluates the patient's response 12 hours after tocilizumab and dexamethasone administration. Complete the sentences by choosing from the dropdown lists.
stem.zh: 护士评估患者在给予托珠单抗和地塞米松后 12 小时的反应。从下拉列表中进行选择以完成句子。

testTakingStrategy.en: Evaluate clinical outcomes using physiological data (vital signs, urine output, neurological status). Remember the specific pharmacological mechanism of tocilizumab on CRP, which makes it an unreliable standalone marker of improvement.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 使用生理数据（生命体征、尿量、神经系统状态）评估临床结果。记住托珠单抗对 CRP 的特定药理机制，这使得它作为独立的改善标志物不可靠。

glossary.defZh: 一种针对 IL-6 受体的单克隆抗体，用于治疗 CRS。
由肝脏产生的炎症标志物，其产生通常由 IL-6 驱动。

clozeStem.en: The patient's clinical improvement is supported by {{1}} and {{2}}. However, the nurse recognizes that the decline in CRP {{3}}, and therefore {{4}}.
clozeStem.zh: 患者的临床改善得到 {{1}} 和 {{2}} 的支持。然而，护士认识到 CRP 的下降 {{3}}，因此 {{4}}。

options.en: an increased need for oxygen support
options.zh: 需要增加氧气支持

options.en: a resolving fever and improved blood pressure without vasopressors
options.zh: 发热消退且不使用血管加压药的情况下血压改善

options.en: a sustained ICE score of 6/10
options.zh: ICE 评分维持在 6/10

options.en: increasing creatinine levels
options.zh: 肌酐水平升高

options.en: improving urine output and an ICE score of 9/10
options.zh: 尿量改善且 ICE 评分为 9/10

options.en: a rising CRP level
options.zh: CRP 水平不断上升

options.en: confirms complete resolution of the inflammatory process
options.zh: 证实炎症过程已完全消退

options.en: indicates that neurotoxicity is fully reversed
options.zh: 表明神经毒性已完全逆转

options.en: is an unreliable marker alone because tocilizumab suppresses CRP production
options.zh: 单独作为一个不可靠的标志物，因为托珠单抗抑制 CRP 的产生

options.en: monitoring can be safely reduced to baseline frequency
options.zh: 监测可以安全地减少到基线频率

options.en: the patient can be immediately discharged
options.zh: 患者可以立即出院

options.en: frequent monitoring must continue because CRS or ICANS can recur
options.zh: 必须继续频繁监测，因为 CRS 或 ICANS 可能复发

correct.en: Clinical improvement after tocilizumab and dexamethasone must be evaluated using multiple parameters. A resolving fever, improved blood pressure without vasopressors, improved urine output, and an ICE score of 9/10 indicate genuine recovery from CRS and ICANS. However, the nurse must recognize that tocilizumab suppresses CRP production by blocking the IL-6 pathway, making a declining CRP an unreliable marker alone. Frequent monitoring must continue because CRS or ICANS can recur or fluctuate after initial improvement.
correct.zh: 必须使用多个参数来评估使用托珠单抗和地塞米松后的临床改善情况。发热消退、不使用血管加压药的情况下血压改善、尿量改善以及 ICE 评分达到 9/10，表明 CRS 和 ICANS 的真正恢复。然而，护士必须认识到，托珠单抗通过阻断 IL-6 途径抑制 CRP 的产生，这使得下降的 CRP 单独作为一个不可靠的标志物。必须继续频繁监测，因为 CRS 或 ICANS 在初步改善后仍可能复发或波动。

byChoice.en: The correct completion is based on the Stage 3 trend and avoids over-relying on CRP after tocilizumab.
byChoice.zh: 正确填空基于阶段 3 的整体趋势，并避免在使用托珠单抗后过度依赖 CRP。

byChoice.en: The correct completion is based on the Stage 3 trend and avoids over-relying on CRP after tocilizumab.
byChoice.zh: 正确填空基于阶段 3 的整体趋势，并避免在使用托珠单抗后过度依赖 CRP。

byChoice.en: The correct completion is based on the Stage 3 trend and avoids over-relying on CRP after tocilizumab.
byChoice.zh: 正确填空基于阶段 3 的整体趋势，并避免在使用托珠单抗后过度依赖 CRP。

byChoice.en: The correct completion is based on the Stage 3 trend and avoids over-relying on CRP after tocilizumab.
byChoice.zh: 正确填空基于阶段 3 的整体趋势，并避免在使用托珠单抗后过度依赖 CRP。

stem.en: Review the client record and answer the case-study items.
stem.zh: 查看患者病历并回答病例分析题目。

correct.en: This case highlights the clinical presentation, diagnosis, and management of immune checkpoint inhibitor–induced myocarditis. The key takeaways are recognizing the combination of elevated troponin, conduction abnormalities, and declining ventricular function as a hallmark of this potentially fatal complication; withholding the offending agent immediately; prioritizing high-dose corticosteroid administration as the definitive treatment; and anticipating multi-organ involvement such as concurrent hepatotoxicity.
correct.zh: 本病例重点介绍了免疫检查点抑制剂诱发的心肌炎的临床表现、诊断和处理。关键要点包括：认识到肌钙蛋白升高、传导异常和心室功能下降是这种潜在致命并发症的标志性表现；立即停用致病药物；优先给予大剂量皮质类固醇作为决定性治疗；以及预期可能出现并发的肝毒性等多器官受累。

testTakingStrategy.en: When analyzing a multi-part case study on a severe adverse drug reaction, systematically assess how the clinical cues confirm the diagnosis, prioritize actions that remove the offending agent and provide definitive treatment, and plan for monitoring related complications.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 在分析关于严重不良药物反应的多部分病例分析时，应系统地评估临床线索如何确诊，优先采取停用致病药物并提供决定性治疗的操作，并制定监测相关并发症的计划。

glossary.defZh: 一种通过解除免疫系统抑制来攻击癌细胞的癌症免疫疗法药物。
心肌的炎症，可导致心力衰竭和心律失常。
一种心肌损伤标志物，其升高提示心肌受损。

title.en: Immune checkpoint inhibitor–induced myocarditis with concurrent hepatotoxicity
title.zh: 免疫检查点抑制剂诱发的心肌炎并发肝毒性

summary.en:
A 61-year-old woman with metastatic melanoma is admitted to the oncology unit for her third cycle of combination immune checkpoint inhibitor (ICI) therapy with nivolumab (anti–PD-1) plus ipilimumab (anti–CTLA-4). Her cancer was diagnosed eight months ago after excision of a Clark level V lesion on the left scapula; subsequent imaging revealed hepatic and pulmonary metastases. She has a history of well-controlled hypertension managed with amlodipine 5 mg daily and no prior cardiac disease. Echocardiogram before starting immunotherapy three months ago showed a left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) of 62% with no wall-motion abnormalities. Her first two cycles were notable only for grade 1 fatigue and a mild maculopapular rash on the trunk that resolved with topical corticosteroids. Current orders include nivolumab 3 mg/kg IV and ipilimumab 1 mg/kg IV to infuse today, ondansetron 4 mg IV PRN nausea, continuous telemetry during infusion, and baseline labs drawn this morning before treatment.

The patient arrives to the infusion area reporting that over the past four days she has noticed increasing fatigue beyond her usual level, a vague sense of chest heaviness that is worse when she climbs the stairs to her bedroom, and mild nausea with poor appetite. She attributes these symptoms to "the chemo catching up with me." She denies frank chest pain, syncope, orthopnea, lower-extremity edema, or fever. She appears mildly fatigued but is conversational, ambulatory, and in no acute distress.
summary.zh:
一名61岁的转移性黑色素瘤女性患者被收治入肿瘤科，准备接受第三个周期的纳武利尤单抗（抗PD-1）联合伊匹木单抗（抗CTLA-4）免疫检查点抑制剂（ICI）联合治疗。8个月前，她在切除左肩胛骨Clark V级病变后确诊癌症；随后的影像学检查显示有肝脏和肺部转移。患者既往有高血压史，每日服用氨氯地平5 mg控制良好，无既往心脏病史。3个月前开始免疫治疗前的超声心动图显示，左心室射血分数（LVEF）为62%，无室壁运动异常。前两个周期仅出现1级疲劳和躯干轻度斑丘疹，局部使用皮质类固醇后消退。目前的医嘱包括今天静脉输注纳武利尤单抗3 mg/kg和伊匹木单抗1 mg/kg，昂丹司琼4 mg静脉推注用于必要时止吐，输液期间持续心电监护，并在治疗前于今晨抽取基线实验室检查血样。

患者到达输液区，自述在过去4天里感到疲劳感比平时加重，有一种模糊的胸部沉重感，在爬楼梯回卧室时加重，并伴有轻度恶心和食欲不振。她将这些症状归因于“化疗的反应”。她否认有明显的胸痛、晕厥、端坐呼吸、下肢水肿或发热。她显得有些疲劳，但能交谈和走动，无急性病容。

title.zh: 评估与基线实验室检查

content.en:
**ASSESSMENT FINDINGS**
Baseline assessment on arrival: temperature 37.1 °C, heart rate 102 and regular, blood pressure 118/74, respiratory rate 20, SpO₂ 96% on room air. Heart sounds are present without murmur, rub, or gallop; lung fields are clear bilaterally. Abdomen is soft, mildly tender in the right upper quadrant on deep palpation, with no hepatomegaly appreciable at the costal margin. Skin shows faint residual erythema on the trunk from the prior rash; no new rash. Peripheral pulses are 2+ and symmetric; no peripheral edema. Telemetry at baseline shows sinus tachycardia at 102 beats per minute with normal P-wave morphology, PR interval 0.16 seconds, and QRS duration 0.09 seconds. The patient rates her chest heaviness as 3 out of 10 and states it is not pleuritic.

**LABORATORY DATA**
Baseline labs drawn this morning: WBC 7.2 × 10³/µL (differential: neutrophils 68%, lymphocytes 18%, monocytes 10%, eosinophils 4%), hemoglobin 11.8 g/dL, platelets 198 × 10³/µL, sodium 139 mEq/L, potassium 4.3 mEq/L, chloride 101 mEq/L, bicarbonate 24 mEq/L, BUN 16 mg/dL, creatinine 0.9 mg/dL, glucose 104 mg/dL, AST 88 U/L (normal up to 35), ALT 112 U/L (normal up to 40), alkaline phosphatase 95 U/L, total bilirubin 1.0 mg/dL, troponin I 0.18 ng/mL (normal < 0.04), BNP 245 pg/mL (normal < 100), CRP 3.8 mg/dL (normal < 0.5), TSH 2.1 mIU/L, LDH 310 U/L.
content.zh:
**评估发现**
到达时的基线评估：体温37.1 °C，心率102次/分且规律，血压118/74 mmHg，呼吸频率20次/分，室内空气下SpO₂ 96%。心音存在，无杂音、摩擦音或奔马律；双侧肺野清晰。腹软，深触诊时右肋下有轻度压痛，肋缘下未触及肝肿大。皮肤显示躯干有既往皮疹留下的微弱残余红斑；无新发皮疹。外周搏动2+且对称；无外周水肿。基线心电监护显示窦性心动过速，心率102次/分，P波形态正常，PR间期0.16秒，QRS波时限0.09秒。患者对胸部沉重感的评分为3分（满分10分），并表示非胸膜炎性疼痛。

**实验室数据**
今晨抽取的基线实验室检查结果：白细胞7.2 × 10³/µL（分类：中性粒细胞68%，淋巴细胞18%，单核细胞10%，嗜酸性粒细胞4%），血红蛋白11.8 g/dL，血小板198 × 10³/µL，钠139 mEq/L，钾4.3 mEq/L，氯101 mEq/L，碳酸氢盐24 mEq/L，血尿素氮（BUN）16 mg/dL，肌酐0.9 mg/dL，葡萄糖104 mg/dL，AST 88 U/L（正常上限35），ALT 112 U/L（正常上限40），碱性磷酸酶95 U/L，总胆红素1.0 mg/dL，肌钙蛋白I 0.18 ng/mL（正常 < 0.04），BNP 245 pg/mL（正常 < 100），CRP 3.8 mg/dL（正常 < 0.5），TSH 2.1 mIU/L，LDH 310 U/L。

content.en: 0 to 2 hours after baseline labs are resulted, before the infusion begins. The nurse reviews the labs and notes the elevated troponin I, BNP, AST, ALT, and CRP in the context of new-onset exertional chest heaviness and resting tachycardia. The treating oncologist is notified. A 12-lead ECG is obtained and shows sinus tachycardia at 104 bpm with diffuse shallow ST-segment depressions in leads I, II, aVL, V4–V6 and a new first-degree AV block (PR interval 0.22 seconds, compared with 0.16 seconds on telemetry strip moments earlier — confirmed to be a change from her pre-treatment ECG on file, which showed a PR of 0.16 seconds). The oncologist places the scheduled ICI infusion on hold and orders an urgent transthoracic echocardiogram and a cardiology consultation. Repeat vital signs: T 37.2 °C, HR 106, BP 112/70, RR 22, SpO₂ 95% on room air. The patient reports her chest heaviness has increased to 5 out of 10 and she now feels short of breath when sitting upright. Right-upper-quadrant tenderness is unchanged.
content.zh: 基线实验室结果出来后0到2小时，输液开始前。护士查阅了实验室报告，注意到在患者新发劳力性胸部沉重和静息心动过速的情况下，肌钙蛋白I、BNP、AST、ALT和CRP升高。已通知主治肿瘤科医生。进行了12导联心电图检查，显示窦性心动过速（104次/分），伴有I、II、aVL、V4-V6导联弥漫性浅表ST段压低，以及新发的一度房室传导阻滞（PR间期0.22秒，相比于刚才心电监护仪上的0.16秒——证实与她档案中的治疗前心电图相比发生了变化，之前的PR为0.16秒）。肿瘤科医生暂停了计划的ICI输注，并开具了紧急经胸超声心动图和心血管内科会诊的医嘱。复查生命体征：体温37.2 °C，心率106次/分，血压112/70 mmHg，呼吸频率22次/分，室内空气下SpO₂ 95%。患者自述其胸部沉重感增加至5分（满分10分），并且现在坐直时感到呼吸急促。右肋下压痛无变化。

content.en: 4 to 6 hours after initial presentation. Cardiology has evaluated the patient. The urgent echocardiogram reveals a new global reduction in left ventricular systolic function with an LVEF of 38% (down from 62% at baseline), diffuse hypokinesis, and no pericardial effusion. Repeat labs: troponin I 1.42 ng/mL (rising sharply from 0.18), BNP 580 pg/mL, AST 156 U/L, ALT 189 U/L, total bilirubin 1.4 mg/dL, CRP 7.2 mg/dL, creatinine 1.0 mg/dL. Repeat 12-lead ECG shows new ventricular ectopy (frequent PVCs, 8–10 per minute) superimposed on sinus tachycardia with persistent ST depressions and new T-wave inversions in the lateral leads; the PR interval is now 0.26 seconds. Vital signs: T 37.3 °C, HR 112 (irregular due to PVCs), BP 104/66, RR 24, SpO₂ 93% on room air. The patient is now dyspneic at rest and reports worsening fatigue; she is diaphoretic and anxious. Cardiology and oncology jointly diagnose probable immune checkpoint inhibitor–induced myocarditis (grade 3–4 immune-related adverse event) with concurrent immune-mediated hepatitis (grade 2, trending toward grade 3). Orders are written to transfer the patient to a higher-acuity monitored cardiac unit, such as telemetry step-down or ICU per acuity/protocol, initiate high-dose intravenous methylprednisolone 1 g IV daily (pulse-dose corticosteroids), start supplemental oxygen via nasal cannula to maintain SpO₂ ≥ 94%, place two large-bore peripheral IVs, obtain a stat serum CK and CK-MB, and permanently discontinue all immune checkpoint inhibitor therapy. A cardiac MRI is planned for the following morning if the patient is stable enough to tolerate it. The nurse administers the first dose of methylprednisolone and titrates oxygen to 3 L/min via nasal cannula, achieving SpO₂ 95%.
content.zh: 初步就诊后4至6小时。心血管内科已对患者进行了评估。紧急超声心动图显示左心室收缩功能出现新的全面下降，LVEF为38%（较基线的62%下降），存在弥漫性运动减弱，无心包积液。复查实验室指标：肌钙蛋白I 1.42 ng/mL（较0.18急剧上升），BNP 580 pg/mL，AST 156 U/L，ALT 189 U/L，总胆红素1.4 mg/dL，CRP 7.2 mg/dL，肌酐1.0 mg/dL。复查12导联心电图显示在窦性心动过速基础上出现新的室性异位搏动（频发室性早搏，每分钟8-10次），伴持续性ST段压低及侧壁导联新发的T波倒置；PR间期现为0.26秒。生命体征：体温37.3 °C，心率112次/分（因室性早搏不规则），血压104/66 mmHg，呼吸频率24次/分，室内空气下SpO₂ 93%。患者现静息时有呼吸困难，并报告疲劳感加重；她大汗淋漓且焦虑。心血管内科和肿瘤科联合诊断为疑似免疫检查点抑制剂诱发的心肌炎（3-4级免疫相关不良事件），并发免疫介导性肝炎（2级，有向3级发展趋势）。医嘱转入更高重症级别的带监护心血管病房（如根据病情/方案转入心电监护降级病房或ICU），开始静脉注射高剂量甲泼尼龙 1 g/日（冲击剂量皮质类固醇），通过鼻导管给予补充氧气以维持SpO₂ ≥ 94%，留置两根大口径外周静脉导管，急查血清CK和CK-MB，并永久停用所有免疫检查点抑制剂治疗。如果患者病情稳定能够耐受，计划在次日上午进行心脏MRI检查。护士给药第一剂甲泼尼龙，并将鼻导管吸氧滴定至3 L/min，使SpO₂达到95%。

content.en: 18 to 24 hours after initiation of pulse-dose corticosteroids. The patient has received two doses of methylprednisolone 1 g IV. Repeat vital signs: T 37.0 °C, HR 94 and regular, BP 114/72, RR 18, SpO₂ 96% on 2 L nasal cannula. Telemetry shows sinus rhythm at 94 bpm with resolution of the frequent PVCs; PR interval has shortened to 0.20 seconds, though ST depressions persist. The patient reports chest heaviness at 2 out of 10 and can sit up and speak in full sentences without dyspnea. Repeat labs: troponin I 0.64 ng/mL (declining from 1.42), BNP 390 pg/mL (declining), AST 132 U/L (declining), ALT 148 U/L (declining), total bilirubin 1.2 mg/dL, CRP 4.1 mg/dL, creatinine 0.9 mg/dL, CK 420 U/L (mildly elevated), blood glucose 218 mg/dL (new hyperglycemia attributed to high-dose corticosteroids). The patient's urine output has averaged 55 mL/hr over the last 8 hours. The care team discusses the treatment plan: a corticosteroid taper over several weeks, ongoing troponin and liver-enzyme monitoring every 6 to 12 hours, cardiology follow-up with a repeat echocardiogram in 48 to 72 hours, and the permanent discontinuation of combination ICI therapy. The oncologist notes that for this patient’s grade 3–4 ICI myocarditis, the treatment plan is permanent discontinuation and the patient should not restart checkpoint inhibitor therapy unless a future specialist oncology/cardiology team explicitly determines otherwise. A new concern at this stage is the steroid-induced hyperglycemia, which requires blood glucose monitoring every 4 to 6 hours and possible sliding-scale insulin coverage.
content.zh: 开始冲击剂量皮质类固醇治疗后18至24小时。患者已接受两剂甲泼尼龙1 g静脉注射。复查生命体征：体温37.0 °C，心率94次/分且规律，血压114/72 mmHg，呼吸频率18次/分，鼻导管吸氧2 L/min下SpO₂ 96%。心电监护显示窦性心律，心率94次/分，频发室性早搏消失；PR间期缩短至0.20秒，但ST段压低依然存在。患者自述胸部沉重感评分为2分（满分10分），能坐起并说出完整句子而无呼吸困难。复查实验室指标：肌钙蛋白I 0.64 ng/mL（较1.42下降），BNP 390 pg/mL（下降），AST 132 U/L（下降），ALT 148 U/L（下降），总胆红素1.2 mg/dL，CRP 4.1 mg/dL，肌酐0.9 mg/dL，CK 420 U/L（轻度升高），血糖218 mg/dL（归因于高剂量皮质类固醇的新发高血糖）。过去8小时内，患者的平均尿量为55 mL/hr。医疗团队讨论了治疗方案：皮质类固醇将在数周内逐渐减量，每6至12小时持续监测肌钙蛋白和肝酶，心内科随访并在48至72小时内复查超声心动图，以及永久停用联合ICI治疗。肿瘤科医生指出，对于该患者的3-4级ICI心肌炎，治疗方案是永久停药，并且患者不应重新开始检查点抑制剂治疗，除非未来的肿瘤科/心内科专家团队明确做出其他决定。现阶段的一个新问题是类固醇引起的高血糖，需要每4至6小时监测血糖，并可能需要滑动标尺胰岛素覆盖。

stem.en: The nurse is preparing to administer the scheduled immune checkpoint inhibitor therapy before Stage 1 begins. Based on the initial assessment and baseline laboratory data, which action should the nurse take first?
stem.zh: 护士正准备在第1阶段开始前给予计划的免疫检查点抑制剂治疗。根据初步评估和基线实验室数据，护士首先应采取哪项操作？

options.en: Administer the PRN ondansetron for the patient's nausea before starting the infusion.
options.zh: 在开始输液前，给予必要时的昂丹司琼以缓解患者的恶心。

options.en: Hold the infusion and immediately notify the oncologist of the laboratory results and patient symptoms.
options.zh: 暂停输液，并立即将实验室结果和患者症状通知肿瘤科医生。

options.en: Proceed with the infusion and monitor the patient's vital signs every 15 minutes.
options.zh: 继续输液，并每15分钟监测一次患者的生命体征。

options.en: Hold the infusion and plan to communicate the findings to the oncologist during routine rounds.
options.zh: 暂停输液，并计划在常规查房期间将发现通知肿瘤科医生。

correct.en: The nurse should hold the infusion and immediately notify the oncologist of the elevated troponin I (0.18 ng/mL), elevated BNP, transaminase elevations, new exertional chest symptoms, and resting tachycardia. Immune checkpoint inhibitors can cause fulminant myocarditis, which carries a mortality rate of up to 25–50% when diagnosed late. An elevated troponin in a patient on combination ICI therapy with new cardiac symptoms is a red-flag cue that must be reported before administering another dose of the causative agent, because additional dosing could accelerate the immune-mediated injury.
correct.zh: 护士应暂停输液并立即将肌钙蛋白I升高（0.18 ng/mL）、BNP升高、转氨酶升高、新发劳力性胸部症状及静息心动过速通知肿瘤科医生。免疫检查点抑制剂可引起暴发性心肌炎，若延迟诊断，其死亡率可高达25-50%。对于接受ICI联合治疗并出现新发心脏症状的患者，肌钙蛋白升高是一个危险信号，必须在给予下一剂致病药物前报告，因为追加给药可能会加速免疫介导的损伤。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. While treating nausea is appropriate, it does not address the life-threatening priority of potential myocarditis and does not delay the harmful ICI infusion.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。虽然治疗恶心是合适的，但它没有解决潜在心肌炎这一危及生命的优先事项，也不能阻止有害的ICI输注。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Proceeding with the scheduled ICI infusion because the troponin elevation is "mild" or attributing symptoms to expected chemotherapy fatigue is unsafe. Administering additional ICI in the setting of evolving myocarditis could precipitate fulminant cardiac failure.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。因为肌钙蛋白仅“轻度”升高或将症状归因于预期的化疗疲劳而继续进行计划的ICI输注是不安全的。在心肌炎进展的情况下追加给予ICI可能会引发暴发性心力衰竭。

byChoice.en: Correct action. The nurse has the authority and obligation to withhold a medication when assessment findings suggest potential harm and to seek clarification from the provider.
byChoice.zh: 正确操作。当评估发现提示潜在的损害时，护士有权也有义务暂停给药，并向医生寻求明确指示。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Holding the infusion but failing to communicate the findings urgently is wrong because ICI myocarditis can progress from stable to fatal within hours; delayed notification delays diagnosis and life-saving treatment.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。暂停输液但未紧急沟通是不正确的，因为ICI心肌炎可在数小时内从稳定恶化为致命；延迟通知会延误诊断和挽救生命的治疗。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a patient receiving high-risk systemic therapy presents with new systemic/cardiac symptoms and abnormal cardiac biomarkers, always prioritize withholding the offending agent and urgent notification over routine interventions or continued administration.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当接受高危全身治疗的患者出现新的全身/心脏症状和异常的心脏生物标志物时，应始终将暂停致病药物和紧急通知放在常规干预或继续给药之前。

stem.en: The nurse reviews the Stage 1 clinical data. The constellation of findings is most consistent with which clinical hypothesis?
stem.zh: 护士查阅了第1阶段的临床数据。这一系列表现最符合以下哪种临床假设？

options.en: Metastatic disease progression into the cardiopulmonary system.
options.zh: 向心肺系统转移的转移性疾病进展。

options.en: Immune checkpoint inhibitor–induced myocarditis with concurrent immune-mediated hepatitis.
options.zh: 免疫检查点抑制剂诱发的心肌炎并发免疫介导性肝炎。

options.en: Viral myocarditis presenting as an isolated infectious process.
options.zh: 表现为孤立性感染过程的病毒性心肌炎。

options.en: Acute coronary syndrome resulting from atherosclerotic plaque rupture.
options.zh: 动脉粥样硬化斑块破裂导致的急性冠状动脉综合征。

correct.en: The combination of diffuse (not territory-specific) ST-segment changes, a new conduction abnormality (prolonging PR interval), troponin elevation, BNP elevation, and concurrent hepatic transaminase elevation in a patient actively receiving combination anti–PD-1/anti–CTLA-4 therapy is the hallmark presentation of ICI myocarditis with multi-organ immune-related adverse events. The concurrent hepatotoxicity suggests a systemic immune-mediated process rather than a single-organ etiology.
correct.zh: 对于正在接受抗PD-1/抗CTLA-4联合治疗的患者，弥漫性（非特定区域）ST段改变、新发传导异常（PR间期延长）、肌钙蛋白升高、BNP升高以及并发肝转氨酶升高，是ICI心肌炎伴多器官免疫相关不良事件的标志性表现。并发的肝毒性提示这是一种系统性的免疫介导过程，而非单器官病因。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. While she has known metastases, disease progression would not typically cause this acute, simultaneous elevation of multiple inflammatory, hepatic, and cardiac biomarkers with new widespread ECG changes.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。虽然已知她有转移灶，但疾病进展通常不会引起多个炎症、肝脏和心脏生物标志物如此急性且同时的升高，并伴有新发的广泛心电图改变。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. ACS remains a differential diagnosis for cardiology to evaluate, but it does not fully explain the diffuse ECG changes, new conduction delay, rising inflammatory markers, and concurrent transaminase elevation in the setting of combination ICI therapy.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。ACS仍然是心血管内科需要评估的鉴别诊断，但它不能完全解释在ICI联合治疗背景下出现的弥漫性心电图改变、新发传导延迟、炎症标志物上升和并发的转氨酶升高。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Viral myocarditis is possible but far less likely in this clinical context. It would also not typically account for the concurrent significant transaminase elevations indicating hepatitis.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。病毒性心肌炎有可能，但在目前的临床背景下可能性小得多。它通常也不能解释并发的表明肝炎的转氨酶显著升高。

byChoice.en: Correct. The systemic involvement (heart and liver) combined with the specific ECG changes strongly points to a multi-organ immune-related adverse event from the ICI therapy.
byChoice.zh: 正确。全身受累（心脏和肝脏）结合特定的心电图改变强烈提示由于ICI治疗引起的多器官免疫相关不良事件。

testTakingStrategy.en: When multiple organs (heart, liver) show simultaneous acute dysfunction in a patient on immune checkpoint inhibitors, recognize the pattern of multi-organ immune-related adverse events (irAEs) rather than independent primary diseases.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当接受免疫检查点抑制剂治疗的患者表现出多个器官（心脏、肝脏）同时急性功能障碍时，应识别出多器官免疫相关不良事件（irAEs）的模式，而不是独立的巧合疾病。

stem.en: At Stage 2, the patient is hemodynamically deteriorating. The nurse receives several urgent orders. In what order should the nurse perform the following actions? All options must be used.
stem.zh: 在第2阶段，患者血流动力学出现恶化。护士收到几项紧急医嘱。护士应按什么顺序执行以下操作？所有选项都必须使用。

options.en: Ensure continuous telemetry and reliable IV access.
options.zh: 确保持续心电监护和可靠的静脉通路。

options.en: Administer the high-dose intravenous methylprednisolone.
options.zh: 静脉注射高剂量甲泼尼龙。

options.en: Apply supplemental oxygen to maintain SpO₂ ≥ 94%.
options.zh: 提供补充氧气以维持SpO₂ ≥ 94%。

options.en: Prepare the patient for transfer to a higher-acuity monitored cardiac unit.
options.zh: 准备将患者转入更高重症级别的带监护心血管病房。

correct.en: After oxygen is applied, the nurse rapidly verifies continuous telemetry and patent IV access so high-dose IV methylprednisolone can be administered without delay. These steps should occur immediately and should not postpone the first steroid dose. Transfer is important but follows oxygenation, monitoring/access verification, and initiation of time-critical immunosuppression.
correct.zh: 在给予氧气后，护士迅速核实持续心电监护和畅通的静脉通路，以便能够毫不延误地静脉注射大剂量甲泼尼龙。这些步骤应立即进行，不应推迟第一剂类固醇的给药。转科固然重要，但应在氧合、监护/通路核实以及启动争分夺秒的免疫抑制治疗之后进行。

byChoice.en: Ensuring monitoring and establishing vascular access are essential prerequisites to safely administering the life-saving high-dose corticosteroid.
byChoice.zh: 确保监护和建立血管通路是安全注射挽救生命的高剂量皮质类固醇的必要先决条件。

byChoice.en: Oxygenation takes immediate priority per the ABCs because the patient's SpO₂ has dropped to 93% and myocardial oxygen demand is already elevated from tachycardia.
byChoice.zh: 根据气道、呼吸和循环（ABCs）原则，氧合是当务之急，因为患者的SpO₂已降至93%，且心动过速已使心肌耗氧量增加。

byChoice.en: ICI myocarditis demands urgent immunosuppression. Delaying corticosteroids allows further T-cell–mediated myocyte destruction.
byChoice.zh: ICI心肌炎需要紧急免疫抑制。延误皮质类固醇治疗会导致T细胞介导的进一步心肌细胞破坏。

byChoice.en: Transferring to a higher-acuity unit is appropriate but must follow initial stabilization and early administration of definitively corrective medications.
byChoice.zh: 转入重症级别更高的病房是合适的，但必须在初步稳定病情并尽早注射决定性治疗药物之后进行。

testTakingStrategy.en: Use ABCs (Airway, Breathing, Circulation) to prioritize oxygenation first. Then, perform actions that allow the administration of the definitive life-saving medication (steroids) before focusing on logistical tasks like transfer.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 利用ABCs（气道、呼吸、循环）原则，首先优先考虑氧合。然后执行允许给予决定性救命药物（类固醇）的操作，最后再关注转移等后勤任务。

stem.en: The nurse prepares a comprehensive monitoring plan for the patient following the administration of corticosteroids. Which of the following nursing interventions should be included? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 护士在给予皮质类固醇后为患者制定全面的监护计划。以下哪些护理干预应包括在内？请选择所有适用项。

options.en: Serial troponin and liver-enzyme monitoring every 6 to 12 hours.
options.zh: 每6至12小时连续监测肌钙蛋白和肝酶。

options.en: Blood glucose monitoring every 4 to 6 hours.
options.zh: 每4至6小时监测一次血糖。

options.en: Discontinuation of cardiac monitoring once the patient's PR interval normalizes.
options.zh: 一旦患者的PR间期恢复正常，即停止心电监护。

options.en: Assessment for overlapping myositis or myasthenia-like symptoms.
options.zh: 评估是否重叠出现肌炎或重症肌无力样症状。

options.en: Continuous telemetry with alarms set for arrhythmias and conduction changes.
options.zh: 持续心电监护，并设置心律失常和传导改变警报。

correct.en: The nurse should generate a solution set that includes continuous telemetry with alarms set for arrhythmias and conduction changes (especially worsening AV block, which can progress to complete heart block), serial troponin levels to track trajectory, serial liver-enzyme monitoring, and blood glucose monitoring anticipating steroid-induced hyperglycemia. The nurse should also assess for signs of other immune-related adverse events, because ICI myocarditis can overlap with neuromuscular immune toxicity. Discontinuing cardiac monitoring is unsafe because ICI myocarditis can deteriorate rapidly to complete heart block or fatal arrhythmia.
correct.zh: 护士应制定一套方案，包括：设置心律失常和传导改变警报的持续心电监护（尤其是可能进展为完全性心脏传导阻滞的房室传导阻滞恶化）；连续监测肌钙蛋白水平以追踪轨迹；连续监测肝酶；以及预期类固醇可能引起高血糖而进行的血糖监测。护士还应评估其他免疫相关不良事件的体征，因为ICI心肌炎可与神经肌肉免疫毒性重叠。停止心电监护是不安全的，因为ICI心肌炎可能迅速恶化为完全性心脏传导阻滞或致命的心律失常。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. ICI myocarditis has a well-documented propensity to progress to complete heart block rapidly; failure to maintain telemetry monitoring can result in unmanaged hemodynamic collapse.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。有充分的文献证明ICI心肌炎容易迅速进展为完全性心脏传导阻滞；未能维持心电监护可能导致无法控制的血流动力学崩溃。

byChoice.en: Correct. Multi-organ immune toxicity is common, and myocarditis frequently overlaps with severe neuromuscular toxicities like myasthenia-like syndromes and myositis.
byChoice.zh: 正确。多器官免疫毒性很常见，心肌炎经常与严重的神经肌肉毒性（如重症肌无力样综合征和肌炎）重叠。

byChoice.en: Correct. Biomarkers are the primary way to evaluate the effectiveness of the immunosuppressive therapy and monitor the concurrent hepatotoxicity.
byChoice.zh: 正确。生物标志物是评估免疫抑制治疗效果和监测并发肝毒性的主要方法。

byChoice.en: Correct. High-dose pulse corticosteroids predictably induce hyperglycemia, requiring close monitoring and possible insulin coverage.
byChoice.zh: 正确。大剂量冲击皮质类固醇可预见地会诱发高血糖，需要密切监测并可能需要胰岛素覆盖。

byChoice.en: Correct. ICI myocarditis frequently targets the conduction system, necessitating continuous monitoring for progression of AV block and other arrhythmias.
byChoice.zh: 正确。ICI心肌炎经常累及传导系统，需要持续监测房室传导阻滞和其他心律失常的进展。

testTakingStrategy.en: Select interventions that monitor the target condition (heart, liver), anticipate complications of the treatment (hyperglycemia from steroids), and screen for known related toxicities (neuromuscular).
testTakingStrategy.zh: 选择能监测目标疾病（心脏、肝脏）、预期治疗并发症（类固醇引起的高血糖）以及筛查已知相关毒性（神经肌肉）的干预措施。

stem.en: At Stage 2, the oncologist writes an order to permanently discontinue all ICI therapy. What is the most appropriate action by the nurse regarding this medication order?
stem.zh: 在第2阶段，肿瘤科医生开具了永久停用所有ICI治疗的医嘱。关于这项药物医嘱，护士最合适的操作是什么？

options.en: Document the ICI discontinuation as a temporary hold and inform the patient that therapy will resume after cardiac recovery.
options.zh: 将ICI停药记录为临时暂停，并告知患者在心脏康复后将恢复治疗。

options.en: Verify the ICI is held/discontinued in the MAR per the provider order, ensure the adverse drug reaction is documented, and educate the patient about the permanent discontinuation.
options.zh: 根据医生医嘱在MAR中确认ICI已暂停/停药，确保不良药物反应得到记录，并就永久停药对患者进行健康教育。

options.en: Independently delete the ICI order from the patient's active medication list to prevent inadvertent administration by another nurse.
options.zh: 独立从患者的有效药物清单中删除ICI医嘱，以防止另一名护士意外给药。

options.en: Request an order to transition the patient from combination therapy to single-agent immunotherapy.
options.zh: 请求医嘱将患者从联合治疗过渡到单药免疫治疗。

correct.en: The nurse should verify the ICI is held/discontinued in the MAR per the provider order; document the medication as not given with the clinical reason; notify pharmacy/oncology if the order remains active; ensure the adverse drug reaction is documented per facility policy; and educate the patient that the immunotherapy was stopped because of a serious heart-and-liver immune reaction. Permanent discontinuation is the standard of care for grade 3–4 ICI myocarditis, given the high fatality risk with re-exposure.
correct.zh: 护士应根据医生医嘱在MAR中确认ICI已暂停/停药；记录该药物未给药及临床原因；如果医嘱仍然有效，通知药房/肿瘤科；确保按照机构政策记录不良药物反应；并教育患者，由于严重的心肝免疫反应，免疫治疗已停止。鉴于再次暴露有很高的致死风险，永久停药是3-4级ICI心肌炎的标准治疗方案。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Re-exposure to even single-agent immunotherapy is generally contraindicated following severe ICI myocarditis.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。在发生严重的ICI心肌炎后，即使是单药免疫治疗，再次暴露通常也是禁忌的。

byChoice.en: Correct action. The nurse ensures the order is executed across all systems (MAR, pharmacy), documents the adverse reaction prominently, and educates the patient to prevent inadvertent re-exposure.
byChoice.zh: 正确操作。护士确保医嘱在所有系统（MAR、药房）中得到执行，突出记录不良反应，并对患者进行教育以防止意外的再次暴露。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Nurses cannot independently delete or discontinue orders; they must verify the action is taken per the provider's order.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。护士不能独立删除或停止医嘱；他们必须核实是根据医生的医嘱采取的行动。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Framing it as a temporary hold is dangerous and could lead to inadvertent re-exposure. Grade 3–4 ICI myocarditis dictates permanent discontinuation unless explicitly determined otherwise by a future specialist team.
byChoice.zh: 不正确。将其描述为临时暂停是危险的，可能导致意外的再次暴露。除非未来的专家团队明确做出其他决定，否则3-4级ICI心肌炎必须永久停药。

testTakingStrategy.en: Select the option that reflects safe nursing scope (verifying orders and documenting) and aligns with the severity of a life-threatening adverse drug reaction (permanent discontinuation and patient education).
testTakingStrategy.zh: 选择反映安全护理范围（核实医嘱和记录）并与危及生命的不良药物反应的严重程度（永久停药和患者教育）相一致的选项。

stem.en: At Stage 3, the nurse evaluates the patient's clinical and laboratory data following 18 to 24 hours of corticosteroid therapy. For each finding, indicate whether it represents a positive response to treatment or a treatment-related adverse effect.
stem.zh: 在第3阶段，护士在皮质类固醇治疗18至24小时后评估患者的临床和实验室数据。对于每项表现，请指出它是代表对治疗的积极反应，还是与治疗相关的不良反应。

columns.zh: 与治疗相关的不良反应

rows.en: Decline in troponin I from 1.42 to 0.64 ng/mL
rows.zh: 肌钙蛋白I从1.42下降至0.64 ng/mL

rows.en: Resolution of frequent premature ventricular contractions (PVCs)

correct.en: The decline in troponin I and the resolution of PVCs confirm a positive response to the immunosuppressive therapy, demonstrating that the immune-mediated injury is being suppressed. The blood glucose of 218 mg/dL is a predictable adverse effect of the high-dose methylprednisolone.
correct.zh: 肌钙蛋白I的下降和室性早搏的消失证实了对免疫抑制治疗的积极反应，表明免疫介导的损伤正在被抑制。血糖218 mg/dL是高剂量甲泼尼龙可预见的不良反应。

byChoice.en: A declining troponin is the most important early marker of response in myocarditis, indicating decreased active myocardial injury.
byChoice.zh: 不断下降的肌钙蛋白是心肌炎有反应的最重要早期标志物，表明活动性心肌损伤减少。

byChoice.en: Resolution of ventricular ectopy indicates stabilization of the myocardium and a positive response.
byChoice.zh: 室性异位搏动的消失表明心肌稳定且反应积极。

byChoice.en: Hyperglycemia is a common, expected adverse effect of systemic pulse-dose corticosteroids.
byChoice.zh: 高血糖是全身性冲击剂量皮质类固醇的常见且预期中的不良反应。

testTakingStrategy.en: Differentiate between signs that the underlying disease process is improving (cardiac markers and rhythms) and new abnormal findings caused by the treatment itself (hyperglycemia from steroids).
testTakingStrategy.zh: 区分潜在疾病过程正在改善的体征（心脏标志物和心律）与治疗本身引起的新异常发现（类固醇导致的高血糖）。

title.en: Severe chemotherapy-induced mucositis with total parenteral nutrition dependence and central line complications
title.zh: 严重的化疗诱发黏膜炎合并全胃肠外营养依赖及中心静脉导管并发症

summary.en:
A 58-year-old woman with acute myeloid leukemia (AML) is on day 12 of induction chemotherapy (cytarabine and daunorubicin, "7+3" regimen) on an inpatient oncology unit. She has a triple-lumen peripherally inserted central catheter (PICC) in her right basilic vein placed on admission. Her medical history includes well-controlled type 2 diabetes (metformin, held during admission; sliding-scale insulin in use), mild chronic kidney disease (baseline creatinine 1.3 mg/dL), and a 30-pack-year smoking history. She is profoundly neutropenic (absolute neutrophil count less than 100/µL) and has been on neutropenic precautions. Five days ago she developed progressive oral and esophageal pain, was unable to swallow liquids, and was started on total parenteral nutrition (TPN) via her PICC line at 85 mL/hr, a dedicated lumen.
